Cape of the Orator.name: Cap de l'Orateur
Cape of the Orator.description:
Adventuring Gear (Shoulders)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in scholar

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your scholar niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. When your dé de supériorité is rolled, you can expend one charge to reroll the die and choose either roll.

When you reach niveau 5 in scholar, you can maintain two targets of your Critical Analysis feature, instead of one. If you use your action bonus to analyze a third target, you choose which Critical Analysis ends.

When you reach niveau 11 in scholar, quand vous utilisez your action bonus to use your Critical Analysis feature, you can target two creatures, instead of just one.

When you reach niveau 17 in scholar, you can take a third réaction each round. You can only take one réaction per turn.

This color-shifting cloak is immune to wrinkles and always has a pressed appearance.

Oscillation Calibrator (Major).name: Calibrateur d'oscillation (majeur)
Oscillation Calibrator (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Oscillation calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

Focus Generator (Superior).name: Générateur de mise au point (supérieur)
Focus Generator (Superior).description:
Focus (Force)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +3 aux jets d'attaque de force pour le pouvoir de la Forces que vous lancez via ce générateur de focalisation.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portatif utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Blaster Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis Blaster (avancé)
Blaster Chassis (Advanced).description:
Arme (n'importe quel Blaster)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de blaster modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de blaster, comme ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Binders (Fine).name: Classeurs (palmes)
Binders (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 16 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. A set of binders comes with one key. Breaking the binders requires a DD 22 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 22 test de Dextérité. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 18 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 11 and 30 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

 

Binders

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 14 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. Breaking the binders requires a DD 20 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 20 test de Dextérité. A set of binders comes with one key. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 15 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 10 and 15 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

Restraining Bolt (Champion).name: Boulon de retenue (Champion)
Restraining Bolt (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de forcer son obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 24 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

Boulon de retenue

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de renforcer son l'obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 14 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

Panic Collimator (Deadly).name: Collimateur de panique (mortel)
Panic Collimator (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 16 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 4, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 13 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Physical Barrier Mk VI.name: Barrière physique Mk VI
Physical Barrier Mk VI.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 60 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of energy, ion, or kinetic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Wristpad (Improved).name: Bracelet (amélioré)
Wristpad (Improved).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +2 aux jets d'attaque technique pour les techniques de pouvoir que vous lancez via ce bracelet.

Wristpad

A le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Handwraps (Champion).name: Pansements (Champion)
Handwraps (Champion).description:
Weapon (Unarmed Strike)

While wearing these handwraps, you have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with your unarmed strikes.

CNS Strength Enhancer.name: CNS Strength Enhancer
CNS Strength Enhancer.description:
Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Lorsque vous portez cette ceinture, votre score de force devient 23. Si votre force est déjà égale ou supérieure à 23, elle n'a aucun effet sur vous.

Cette ceinture augmente encore la puissance physique de l'utilisateur grâce à des solives d'assistance pneumatiques et un microgénérateur à champ répulsif.

Torpedo, Plasma (Deadly).name: Torpille, Plasma (Mortel)
Torpedo, Plasma (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced torpedo launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 20d10]] energy dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the torpedo is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

Cloak Chassis (Standard).name: Châssis de cape (standard)
Cloak Chassis (Standard).description:
Équipement d'aventure (épaules)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté standard.

Grenade Launcher (Improved).name: Lance-grenades (amélioré)
Grenade Launcher (Improved).description:
Weapon (Grenade Launcher)

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don't meet the grenade launcher's strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total. You have a +2 bonus to the sauvegarde DD and jet de dégâtss of grenades fired by this enhanced grenade launcher.

 

Grenade launcher

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Special (range 90/360)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don—t meet the grenade launcher—s strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade—s explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Dexterity Stim (Exceptional).name: Dexterity Stim (Exceptional)
Dexterity Stim (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Dexterity score increases by 8, and its maximum for this score increases by 8. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Jetpack (Superior).name: Jetpack (Supérieur)
Jetpack (Superior).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 60 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 16 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

 

Jetpack

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 30 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 10 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Power Cell (Average).name: Cellule de puissance (moyenne)
Power Cell (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced power cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Missile, Fragmentation (Lethal).name: Missile, Fragmentation (Métal)
Missile, Fragmentation (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 5d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

 

Missile, fragmentation

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

Grenade, Plasma (Deadly).name: Grenade à plasma (Mortelle)
Grenade, Plasma (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Grenade, plasma

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Sorcerer's Adrenal (Basic).name: Surrénale du sorcier (de base)
Sorcerer's Adrenal (Basic).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible gains a +1 bonus to its dégâts and healing rolls with pouvoir de la Forces. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Strength Stim (Superior).name: Strength Stim (Superior)
Strength Stim (Superior).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Strength score increases by 6, and its maximum for this score increases by 6. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Incendiary Cell (Devastating).name: Cellule incendiaire (dévastatrice)
Incendiary Cell (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced incendiary cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the incendiary cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d12]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Incendiary cell

An incendiary cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Grenade, Incendiary (Major).name: Grenade incendiaire (majeure)
Grenade, Incendiary (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 6d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

 

Grenade, incendiary

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Thermal Detonator (Devastating).name: Détonateur thermique (dévastateur)
Thermal Detonator (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Thermal detonators are unique in that can only be turned off by whoever turned them on. They can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] fire and [[/r 12d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

 

Thermal detonator

Thermal detonators are unique in that can only be turned off by whoever turned them on. They can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] fire and [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

Medpac (Champion).name: Medpac (Champion)
Medpac (Champion).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls six dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Medpac

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

Focus Generator Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis du générateur de mise au point (avancé)
Focus Generator Chassis (Advanced).description:
Focus (Force)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de générateur de mise au point modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du générateur de mise au point, ainsi qu'une augmentation fente. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portable utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Torpedo, Fragmentation (Deadly).name: Torpille, Fragmentation (Mortelle)
Torpedo, Fragmentation (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced torpedo launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 20d10]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the torpedo is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

Mantle of the Anomic.name: Manteau de l'Anomic
Mantle of the Anomic.description:
Adventuring Gear (Shoulders)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in sentinel

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your sentinel niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. When you would use a Force-Empowered Self option, you can expend charges instead of point de Forces.

When you reach niveau 5 in sentinel, you can use two Force-Empowered Self options per hit, instead of only one.

When you reach niveau 11 in sentinel, you can use each Force-Empowered Self option twice per turn, instead of only once. You can still only use each option once per hit.

When you reach niveau 17 in sentinel, you can use your Enlightened Evasion feature for any jet de sauvegardes, instead of just against effects that deal dégâts.

This visually unremarkable mantle resists effects that would cause it to move or make noise.

Power Generator (Average).name: Générateur de puissance (moyenne)
Power Generator (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced power generator. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power generator is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power generator

Power generators energize the blaster cannon.

Mine, Stun (Lethal).name: Le mien, étourdissant (mortel)
Mine, Stun (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, stun

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Deafening Dart (Deadly).name: Fléchette assourdissante (mortel)
Deafening Dart (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Deafening dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Wisdom Stim (Improved).name: Wisdom Stim (Improved)
Wisdom Stim (Improved).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Wisdom score increases by 4, and its maximum for this score increases by 4. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Dexterity Stim (Improved).name: Dexterity Stim (Improved)
Dexterity Stim (Improved).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Dexterity score increases by 4, and its maximum for this score increases by 4. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Credit Chip (Fine).name: Puce de crédit (amende)
Credit Chip (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par vérification du kit de trancheuse DD 18.

Puce de crédit

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par le contrôle du kit d'une trancheuse DD 15.

Grenade, Cryo (Deadly).name: Grenade, Cryo (Mortelle)
Grenade, Cryo (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). Raava (Fine).name: Raava (Bien)
Raava (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Raava is a traditional liquor breed from zsajhira berries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Adventuring Gear (Back)

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 40 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 12 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Grenade Launcher (Champion).name: Lance-grenades (Champion)
Grenade Launcher (Champion).description:
Weapon (Grenade Launcher)

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don't meet the grenade launcher's strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total. You have a +3 bonus to the sauvegarde DD and deal two additional dégâts dice with grenades fired by this enhanced grenade launcher.

 

Grenade launcher

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Special (range 90/360)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don—t meet the grenade launcher—s strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade—s explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Équipement d'aventure (pieds)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Pendant que vous portez ces bottes, vous pouvez utiliser un bonus d'action pour activer ou désactiver leur mode overdrive. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Mine, Deafening (Lethal).name: Le mien, assourdissant (mortel)
Mine, Deafening (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, deafening

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Charge, Fragmentation (Devastating).name: Charge, fragmentation (dévastatrice)
Charge, Fragmentation (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d20]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, fragmentation

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Mandalorian Beskar'gam.name: Beskar'gam mandalorien
Mandalorian Beskar'gam.description:
Armure (Toutes)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cette armure est équipée de 24 emplacements pouvant chacun contenir un seul objet pesant moins. De plus, il accorde un bonus de +1 à AC.

Vêtements mandaloriens. En portant et en harmonie avec cette armure et ce casque mandalorien, vous êtes capable de survivre et d'opérer dans un espace en apesanteur et dans d'autres conditions dangereuses. De plus, cette armure accorde désormais un bonus de +2 à la CA, au lieu de +1. Lorsque vous portez et êtes en harmonie avec cette armure, le casque mandalorien et le Shuk'orok mandalorien, cette armure accorde désormais un bonus de +3 à la CA, au lieu de +2.

Cette armure est forgée à partir d'un matériau incroyablement rare connu sous le nom de beskar, un métal très durable.

Incendiary Cell (Average).name: Cellule incendiaire (moyenne)
Incendiary Cell (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced incendiary cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the incendiary cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Incendiary cell

An incendiary cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Tsiraki (Aged).name: Tsiraki (âgé)
Tsiraki (Aged).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Tsiraki is a blue-colored alcoholic beverage crafted from fermented salakberries and pickling spices. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tsiraki

Tsiraki is a blue-colored alcoholic beverage crafted from fermented salakberries and pickling spices. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Electrifying Cartridge (Major).name: Cartouche électrifiante (Majeure)
Electrifying Cartridge (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced electrifying cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the electrifying cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

 

Electrifying cartridge

An electrifying cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

Bolas (Fine).name: Bolas (Bien)
Bolas (Fine).description:
Weapon (Bolas)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 14 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 11, 10 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

 

Bolas

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 20/60)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Yaladai (High Quality).name: Yaladai (haute qualité)
Yaladai (High Quality).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yaladai is a powerful stimulant that grants extreme clarity, improving relaxation and focus. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d8]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d8]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Yaladai

Yaladai is a powerful stimulant that grants extreme clarity, improving relaxation and focus. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Boots of Hiding.name: Bottes de cachette
Boots of Hiding.description:
Adventuring Gear (Feet)

While wearing these boots, creatures have disavantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks made to track your steps.

De plus, you can use a action bonus to cause the boots to leave behind no footprints pendant 1 minute. When you do, another set of similar footprints appear on the ground that lead in random directions. These footprints last for 8 hours and travel up to 300 mètres. A successful DD 14 Intelligence (Investigation) check reveals that the footprints are false. Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

Incendiary Cell (Deadly).name: Cellule incendiaire (mortel)
Incendiary Cell (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced incendiary cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the incendiary cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Incendiary cell

The loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Mine, Incendiary (Deadly).name: Mine, incendiaire (mortel)
Mine, Incendiary (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

 

Mine, incendiary

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Missile, Incendiary (Major).name: Missile incendiaire (majeur)
Missile, Incendiary (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 3d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Missile, incendiary

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Karrak (Fine).name: Karrak (Bien)
Karrak (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d4]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d4]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Karrak

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Armor Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis blindé (prototype)
Armor Chassis (Prototype).description:
Armure (Tout)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'armure modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications d'armure, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté de prototype ou inférieure.

Camtono (Champion).name: Camtono (Champion)
Camtono (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 30 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 10 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube, a un AC de 15 et 90 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les marchandises stockées à l'intérieur.

Camtono

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 15 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 10 et 15 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les biens stockés à l'intérieur.

Ring of Adept Force Storing.name: Anneau de stockage de force adepte
Ring of Adept Force Storing.description:
Adventuring Gear (Finger)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke le pouvoir de la Force lancé dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que l'harmonie soit accordée. le porteur les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 6 niveaux de pouvoir de la Forces à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d7]] - 1 niveaux de pouvoir de la Force stockés choisis par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer un pouvoir de la Force du 1er au niveau 6 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que le pouvoir de la Force est lancé. Le pouvoir de la Force n'a d'autre effet que d'être stocké dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir le pouvoir de la Force, le pouvoir de la Force est dépensé sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer le pouvoir de la Force détermine l'espace qu'il utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quel pouvoir de la Force qui y est stocké. Le pouvoir de la Force utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde de force, le bonus d'attaque de force et la capacité de lancement forcé du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traité comme si vous lanciez le pouvoir de la Force. Le pouvoir de la Force lancé depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stocké, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Grenade, Corrosive (Major).name: Grenade, corrosive (majeure)
Grenade, Corrosive (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Grenade, corrosive

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Dexterity Stim (Fine).name: Dexterity Stim (Fine)
Dexterity Stim (Fine).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Dexterity score increases by 2, and its maximum for this score increases by 2. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

GNS Strength Enhancer.name: GNS Strength Enhancer
GNS Strength Enhancer.description:
Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Lorsque vous portez cette ceinture, votre score de force devient 25. Si votre force est déjà égale ou supérieure à 25, elle n'a aucun effet sur vous.

Cette grande ceinture augmente considérablement la puissance physique de l'utilisateur grâce à une gamme de microgénérateurs à champ répulsif et une paire d'actionneurs de levage réactifs qui augmentent la force brute et la capacité de levage sans aucune perte de vitesse ou de motricité fine.

Vayerbok (Special).name: Vayerbok (Spécial)
Vayerbok (Special).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Vayerbok is a thick, green, vegetable-based alcoholic beverage typically served hot. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Vayerbok

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Missile, Ion (Lethal).name: Missile, Ion (Métal)
Missile, Ion (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 5d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Missile, ion

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Repair Kit Mk II.name: Kit de réparation Mk II
Repair Kit Mk II.description:
Consumable (Technology)

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls two dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Repair kit

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid or construct after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal

Electrifying Dart (Average).name: Fléchette électrisante (moyenne)
Electrifying Dart (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Electrifying dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Panic Calibrator (Major).name: Calibrateur de panique (majeur)
Panic Calibrator (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 15 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 3, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 13 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Orbalisk Armor.name: Armure d'Orbalisk
Orbalisk Armor.description:
Armor (Heavy Exoskeleton)

This armor has no weight and does not affect encumbrance. While wearing it, you are considered proficient regardless of whether or not you have maîtrise with heavy armor, and you are resistant to all unenhanced dégâts.

Cursed. You can not remove this armor without first killing the orbalisks. While wearing this armor, whenever you complete a repos long, you must make a DD 15 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. Vous pouvez choisir to fail this jet de sauvegarde. For each jet de sauvegarde you fail, the size of your Hit Die is reduced by one step (from [[/r d12]] to [[/r d10]], from [[/r d10]] to [[/r d8]], from [[/r d8]] to [[/r d6]], from [[/r d6]] to [[/r d4]], or from [[/r d4]] to [[/r d2]]). Si vous échouez a jet de sauvegarde while your Hit Die is a [[/r d2]], you die as the orbalisks consume you. De plus, for each jet de sauvegarde you fail, your AC increases by 1. For each jet de sauvegarde you succeed, the size of your Hit Die increases by one step (from [[/r d2]] to [[/r d4]], from [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], from [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]], from [[/r d8]] to [[/r d10]], or from [[/r d10]] to [[/r d12]]). De plus, for each jet de sauvegarde you succeed, your AC decreases by 1. The size of your Hit Die can not exceed the Hit Dice granted by your class, and your AC can not be increased or reduced more than the number of Hit Die increases or reductions.

This armor is comprised of a series of small parasitic creatures called orbalisks. Over time, orbalisks reproduce until they cover the entirety of their host.

 

Heavy exoskeleton

Bulky

While wearing armor with this property, you have disavantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks that rely on sound.

Strength 17

While wearing armor or wielding a shield with this property, your speed is reduced by 10 unless your Strength score meets or exceeds the strength number.

Heavy exoskeletons are virtually the heaviest armor acquirable during the Galactic War. It is ideal for extreme combat situations that involved direct dégâts and also offers a very good niveau of protection in sacrifice of dexterity. Some consider it claustrophobic but that was the trade-off for safety.

Flux Collimator (Devastating).name: Collimateur de flux (dévastateur)
Flux Collimator (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Flux collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

Oscillation Calibrator (Deadly).name: Calibrateur d'oscillation (mortel)
Oscillation Calibrator (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. Oscillation calibrator

Power Cell (Deadly).name: Cellule de puissance (mortel)
Power Cell (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced power cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Wisdom Stim (Superior).name: Wisdom Stim (Superior)
Wisdom Stim (Superior).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Wisdom score increases by 6, and its maximum for this score increases by 6. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Mine, Incendiary (Major).name: Mine, incendiaire (majeur)
Mine, Incendiary (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

 

Mine, incendiary

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Tsiraki (Reserve).name: Tsiraki (Réserve)
Tsiraki (Reserve).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Tsiraki is a blue-colored alcoholic beverage crafted from fermented salakberries and pickling spices. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d10]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d10]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tsiraki

Tsiraki is a blue-colored alcoholic beverage crafted from fermented salakberries and pickling spices. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Wristpad Chassis (Legendary).name: Châssis du bracelet (légendaire)
Wristpad Chassis (Legendary).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bracelet modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du poignet, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut accueillir des modifications d'une rareté légendaire ou inférieure.

Wristpad

A Le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Shield Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis de bouclier (prototype)
Shield Chassis (Prototype).description:
Bouclier (tous)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bouclier modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications d'armure, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté de prototype ou inférieure.

Restraining Bolt (Exceptional).name: Boulon De Retenue (Exceptionnel)
Restraining Bolt (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de forcer son obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 22 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

J-19 Bo-Rifle.name: Fusil Bo J-19
J-19 Bo-Rifle.description:
Weapon (Bo-Rifle)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss with this enhanced weapon. De plus, while it is in staff mode, the sauvegarde DD for its shocking property increases to 14.

This more recent and less artfully designed model of bo-rifle comes with a bayonet attached to the top edge.

 

Bo-rifle

Modal (blaster rifle and techstaff)

A weapon with this property can switch between modes. A list of weapons in parentheses appears with the property-the weapons between which an exotic weapon can be switched by using an object interaction.

Remote Detonator (Fine).name: Détonateur à distance (fin)
Remote Detonator (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to four mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 60 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

 

Remote detonator

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to two mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 30 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

Flechette Mag, Plasma (Average).name: Fléchette Mag, Plasma (Moyenne)
Flechette Mag, Plasma (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Flechette mag, plasma

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Yaladai (Fine).name: Yaladaï (Bien)
Yaladai (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yaladai is a powerful stimulant that grants extreme clarity, improving relaxation and focus. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d4]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d4]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Yaladai

Yaladai is a powerful stimulant that grants extreme clarity, improving relaxation and focus. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Armor (Improved).name: Armure (améliorée)
Armor (Improved).description:
Armure (Toute)

Vous bénéficiez d'un bonus de +2 à la CA lorsque vous portez cette armure.

Vitapac (Exceptional).name: Vitapac (Exceptionnel)
Vitapac (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

This fast-acting syringe grants a revitalizing boost. As an action, you can use this vitapac to restore expended Hit Dice to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature immediately regains eight Hit Dice. If la créature has spent Hit Dice of different sizes, determine which Hit Dice are restored randomly.

As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which activates at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Mine, fragmentation

Intelligence Stim (Fine).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Intelligence score increases by 2, and its maximum for this score increases by 2. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Projector Canister, Corrosive (Average).name: Cartouche de projecteur, corrosive (moyenne)
Projector Canister, Corrosive (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, corrosive

A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde.
