If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Charisma Stim (Exceptional).name: Charisma Stim (Exceptional)
Charisma Stim (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Charisma score increases by 8, and its maximum for this score increases by 8. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Portable Teleporter Mk V.name: Téléporteur portable Mk V
Portable Teleporter Mk V.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can use this teleporter to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 300 mètres away. These portals lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal.

Net (Fine).name: Net (Bien)
Net (Fine).description:
Weapon (Net)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 14 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 11, 10 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

 

Net

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Thrown (range 15)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

Vayerbok (Aged).description:

Vayerbok is a thick, green, vegetable-based alcoholic beverage typically served hot. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Torpedo, Plasma (Lethal).name: Torpille, Plasma (Métal)
Torpedo, Plasma (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced torpedo launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 20d12]] energy dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the torpedo is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

Thermal Detonator (Lethal).name: Détonateur thermique (mortel)
Thermal Detonator (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Thermal detonators are unique in that can only be turned off by whoever turned them on. They can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] fire and [[/r 10d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

 

Thermal detonator

Thermal detonators are unique in that can only be turned off by whoever turned them on. They can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] fire and [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

Physical Barrier Mk IV.name: Barrière physique Mk IV
Physical Barrier Mk IV.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 40 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of energy, ion, or kinetic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Oscillation Calibrator (Lethal).name: Calibrateur d'oscillation (létal)
Oscillation Calibrator (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

 

Oscillation calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

Tunic Chassis (Premium).name: Châssis Tunique (Premium)
Tunic Chassis (Premium).description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté premium ou inférieure.

Glitterstim (Potent).name: Glitterstim (Puissant)
Glitterstim (Potent).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A silvery-green webbing sharp to the contact, yet when liquidized causes a heightened mental state and pleasurable boost. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d10]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d10]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Glitterstim

A silvery-green webbing sharp to the contact, yet when liquidized causes a heightened mental state and pleasurable boost. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution

jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Ring of Novice Force Storing.name: Anneau de stockage de force novice
Ring of Novice Force Storing.description:
Adventuring Gear (Finger)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke le pouvoir de la Force lancé dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que l'harmonie soit accordée. le porteur les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 2 niveaux de pouvoir de la Forces à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d3]] - 1 niveaux de pouvoir de la Force stockés choisis par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer un pouvoir de la Force de 1er ou de niveau 2 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que le pouvoir de la Force est lancé. Le pouvoir de la Force n'a d'autre effet que d'être stocké dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir le pouvoir de la Force, le pouvoir de la Force est dépensé sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer le pouvoir de la Force détermine l'espace qu'il utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quel pouvoir de la Force qui y est stocké. Le pouvoir de la Force utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde de force, le bonus d'attaque de force et la capacité de lancement forcé du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traité comme si vous lanciez le pouvoir de la Force. Le pouvoir de la Force lancé depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stocké, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Restraining Bolt (Improved).name: Boulon de retenue (amélioré)
Restraining Bolt (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de forcer son obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 18 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

Boulon de retenue

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de renforcer son l'obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 14 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

Sith Warrior's Robe.name: Robe du guerrier Sith
Sith Warrior's Robe.description:
Adventuring Gear (Body)

Requires attunement

You gain a +2 bonus to jet de dégâtss with weapons and pouvoir de la Forces while you wear this robe.

Designed for those who relish personal combat, and know that power comes to those who take it, these robes greatly augment offensive capabilities with no hindrance to movement.

Projector Tank, Corrosive (Average).name: Réservoir du projecteur, corrosif (moyen)
Projector Tank, Corrosive (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust.

 

Projector tank, corrosive

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust.

Panic Calibrator (Deadly).name: Calibrateur de panique (mortel)
Panic Calibrator (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 16 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 4, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 13 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Tool (Fine).name: Outil (aileron)
Tool (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear

Your level of maîtrise in these tools increases by two steps (to proficient, from trained to expertise, from proficient to mastery, from expertise to high mastery, or from mastery to grand mastery).

Smugglepack (Superior).name: Smugglepack (Supérieur)
Smugglepack (Superior).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal pouvant stocker 12 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 8 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 24.

Smugglepack

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal qui stocke 15,00 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 15.

Projector Tank, Cryo (Average).name: Réservoir de projecteur, cryo (moyenne)
Projector Tank, Cryo (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 3d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Projector tank, cryo

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Mummergy (Reserve).name: Mummergy (Réserve)
Mummergy (Reserve).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Mummergy is a strong-smelling liquor derived from a plant of the same name. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d10]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d10]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Mummergy

Mummergy is a strong-smelling liquor derived from a plant of the same name. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Dexterity Stim (Basic).name: Dexterity Stim (Basic)
Dexterity Stim (Basic).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Dexterity score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Charge, Fragmentation (Deadly).name: Charge, fragmentation (mortel)
Charge, Fragmentation (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, fragmentation

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Shield (Exceptional).name: Bouclier (Exceptionnel)
Shield (Exceptional).description:
Shield (Any)

You have a +3 bonus to AC while wielding this shield. De plus, while wielding this shield, dégâts you take is reduced by 1. If this would reduce the dégâts to 0, the dégâts is instead reduced to 1.

Panic Dart (Major).name: Fléchette de panique (majeure)
Panic Dart (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Panic dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Tihaar (Aged).name: Tihaar (âgé)
Tihaar (Aged).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This colorless spirit, favored by Mandalorians, burns the mouth and throat when consumed. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d8]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d8]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tihaar

This colorless spirit, favored by Mandalorians, burns the mouth and throat when consumed. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Rocket, Fragmentation (Devastating).name: Fusée, Fragmentation (Dévastateur)
Rocket, Fragmentation (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced rocket launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 4d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the rocket is fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 12d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

 

Rocket, fragmentation

This rocket launcher ammunition deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

Shotgun Axe.name: Hache de fusil de chasse
Shotgun Axe.description:
Weapon (Shotgun)

You have a +1 to jet de dégâtss made with this shotgun. De plus, this shotgun has an axe attachment, allowing you to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps with it. The axe is a melee weapon that you are proficient with, and deals [[/r 1d8]] kinetic dégâts.

De plus, quand vous utilisez this shotgun as an improvised weapon, you are considered proficient in it, and it deals [[/r 1d8]] kinetic dégâts on a hit.

"Oh you want clever? Come a little closer, I'll get real clever."

 

Shotgun

Burst 2

When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with this property, you can instead spray a 10-foot-cube area within range with shots, consuming ammunition equal to the burst number. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts. Before you use this property, you can declare une créature that would be affected by it. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, in addition to the weapon's normal dégâts, it is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit. If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Reload 4

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Slug cartridge (range 30/120)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Grenade, Incendiary (Deadly).name: Grenade incendiaire (mortel)
Grenade, Incendiary (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 8d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

 

Grenade, incendiary

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Grenade, Gas (Lethal).name: Grenade, gaz (létale)
Grenade, Gas (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, filling the air in a 10-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 10d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

 

Grenade, gas

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, filling the air in a 10-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

Wisdom Stim (Exceptional).name: Wisdom Stim (Exceptional)
Wisdom Stim (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Wisdom score increases by 8, and its maximum for this score increases by 8. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Environmental Barrier Mk VI.name: Barrière environnementale Mk VI
Environmental Barrier Mk VI.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 90 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Handwraps Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis de bandages (avancé)
Handwraps Chassis (Advanced).description:
Arme (frappe à mains nues)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ces châssis de bandages modifiables sont livrés avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour l'arme vibrante. modifications, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Ils peuvent abriter des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Flechette Clip, Ion (Devastating).name: Clip Fléchette, Ion (Dévastateur)
Flechette Clip, Ion (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Flechette clip, ion

Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Grenade, Ion (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Grenade, ion

Cilona (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Cilona, the active ingredient in deathsticks, is a hallucinogen that causes an ecstatic feeling that improves strength. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Jetpack (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 50 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 14 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Tool (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear

Your level of maîtrise in these tools increases by three steps (to expertise, from trained to mastery, from proficient to high mastery, or from expertise to grand mastery).

Power Cell (Lethal).name: Cellule de puissance (létale)
Power Cell (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with this enhanced power cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Andris (High Quality).name: Andris (haute qualité)
Andris (High Quality).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Refined andris crystal, a spice mined most commonly on Sevarcos II, sharpens a creature's mind when smoked. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Datacron Mk I.description:
Adventuring Gear

This datacron contains a single at-will pouvoir technique. After tinkering with the datacron for at least 2 hours, a techcaster with a Max Power Niveau of 1st or higher can make a DD 10 techcasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir technique, which does not count against their pouvoir techniques known. On a failure, the power is not learned and the techcaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Datacrons are encrypted storage devices that contain an interactive projection, and are used to store high-value, sensitive information.

 

Datacron

A datacron is a type of holocron that can be accessed by non-Force-sensitives and are mainly used to store encrypted data. They are complete with an interactive projection to access the information.

Credit Chip (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par vérification du kit de trancheuse DD 30.

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Wristpad

A Le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

 

Missile, fragmentation

Missile, fragmentation

Mine, Stun (Average).name: Le mien, étourdissant (moyen)
Mine, Stun (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, stun

Environmental Barrier Mk V.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 75 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Sith Lord's Robe.name: Robe du Seigneur Sith
Sith Lord's Robe.description:
Adventuring Gear (Body)

Requires attunement

You gain a +3 bonus to jet de dégâtss with weapons and pouvoir de la Forces while you wear this robe.

Designed for those who relish personal combat, and know that power comes to those who take it, these robes masterfully augment offensive capabilities with no hindrance to movement.

Electrifying Collimator (Deadly).name: Collimateur électrisant (mortel)
Electrifying Collimator (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 16 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 4, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Electrifying collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portable utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Arme (frappe à mains nues)

Baragwin Stealth Unit.name: Unité furtive Baragwin
Baragwin Stealth Unit.description:
Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Lorsque vous portez cette ceinture, vous pouvez activer son champ furtif pour provoquer votre personnel pour devenir invisible. Tant que vous êtes invisible, tout ce que vous portez ou portez est invisible avec vous. Vous devenez visible lorsque vous éteignez le terrain. L'activation ou la désactivation du champ nécessite une action.

Déduisez le temps pendant lequel vous êtes invisible, par incréments de 1 minute, de la durée maximale de 2 heures de la ceinture. Après 2 heures d'utilisation, la ceinture cesse de fonctionner. Pour chaque période ininterrompue de 12 heures, la ceinture reste inutilisée, elle regagne 1 heure d'utilisation.

Ces Baragwin qui cherchaient à transformer leur empathie télépathique en un atout pour la chasse aux primes avaient besoin de quelque chose de spécial pour surmonter les inconvénients de leurs cadres encombrants.

Medpac (Exceptional).name: Medpac (exceptionnel)
Medpac (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls five dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Medpac

The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced cryo cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Cryo cell

On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Rocket, ion

Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with this enhanced power generator. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the torpedo is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power generator

Power generators energize the blaster cannon.

Deafening Cell (Devastating).name: Cellule assourdissante (dévastatrice)
Deafening Cell (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced deafening cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the deafening cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals sonic dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d10]] sonic dégâts and is assourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't assourdi.

 

Deafening cell

The loaded weapon deals sonic dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. Repair Kit Mk IV.name: Kit de réparation Mk IV
Repair Kit Mk IV.description:
Consumable (Technology)

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls four dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Repair kit

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid or construct after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal

Blueprint (Artifact).name: Plan (artefact)
Blueprint (Artifact).description:
Adventuring Gear

Ce plan contient des informations concernant les matériaux bruts et rares, les outils et les étapes nécessaires pour fabriquer un objet rare. Pendant 1 heure, ce qui peut être fait lors d'un tribunal de repos, un personnage peut tenter d'apprendre le plan. S'ils le font, ils doivent réaliser un test d'Intelligence DD 30 avec les outils appropriés. En cas de réussite, le plan de l'objet est appris. En cas d'échec, le plan n'est pas appris et le personnage doit attendre 24 heures avant de pouvoir réessayer.

Les plans contiennent les secrets de la fabrication d'objets de nature plus complexe.

Rocket Boots (Exceptional).name: Bottes de fusée (exceptionnelles)
Rocket Boots (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear (Feet)

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 45 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cell.

 

Rocket boots

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Lightweapon Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis d'arme légère (prototype)
Lightweapon Chassis (Prototype).description:
Arme (toute arme légère)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme légère modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes légères, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté de prototype ou inférieure.

Karrak (Pure).name: Karrak (pur)
Karrak (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d12]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d12]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution throw to resist addiction.

 

Karrak

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Grenade, Plasma (Major).name: Grenade, Plasma (Majeure)
Grenade, Plasma (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Grenade, plasma

As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Shoulder Cannon (Champion).name: Canon d'épaule (Champion)
Shoulder Cannon (Champion).description:
Weapon (Shoulder Cannon)

Mounted in the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon. You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with this enhanced shoulder cannon, which has the smart (20, +6) property.

 

Shoulder cannon

Auto

Weapons with this property can only fire in burst, penetrating, or rapid modes. If the weapon has any combination of burst, penetrating, and rapid modes, you choose which mode to use. You can only use one mode at a time.

Burst 8

When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with this property, you can instead spray a 10-foot-cube area within range with shots, consuming ammunition equal to the burst number. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts. Before you use this property, you can declare une créature that would be affected by it. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, in addition to the weapon's normal dégâts, it is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit. If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Power cell (range 60/240) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 8

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Smart (15/+2)

This weapon ignores your Dexterity score and bonus de maîtrise. Two numbers appear in parentheses with the property—the first is the weapon's Dexterity score, and the second is the weapon's bonus de maîtrise. The weapon uses these values instead of yours quand vous faites attack and jet de dégâtss with it. If you lack maîtrise with the weapon, the weapon does not benefit from its bonus de maîtrise.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Special

Mounted by the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Once the gas cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

 

Gas cartridge

Clothes, Clandestine (Champion).name: Vêtements clandestins (Champion)
Clothes, Clandestine (Champion).description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Ces vêtements sont livrés avec neuf poches cachées, chacune pouvant stocker jusqu'à 1 lb. Trouver ces poches cachées nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 30.

Vêtements clandestins

Ces vêtements sont livrés avec deux poches cachées, chacune pouvant contenir jusqu'à 1,00 lb. Trouver ces poches cachées nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 15.

Oscillation Calibrator (Average).name: Calibrateur d'oscillation (moyenne)
Oscillation Calibrator (Average).description:

As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 1,000 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, cryo

Once the cryo cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Ring of Tech Storing Mk I.name: Anneau de technologie stockant le Mk I
Ring of Tech Storing Mk I.description:
Adventuring Gear (Doigt)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke les techniques de pouvoir lancées dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que le porteur soit à l'écoute. les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 2 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d3]] - 1 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir stockées choisies par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer une technique de pouvoir de 1er ou de niveau 2 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que la technique de pouvoir est lancée. La technique du pouvoir n'a aucun effet, si ce n'est d'être stockée dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir la technique du pouvoir, la technique du pouvoir est dépensée sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer la technique de pouvoir détermine l'espace qu'elle utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quelle technique de pouvoir qui y est stockée. La technique du pouvoir utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde technologique, le bonus d'attaque technologique et la capacité de lancement technique du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traitée comme si vous lanciez la technique du pouvoir. La technique de pouvoir lancée depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stockée, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

You gain a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss with this enhanced weapon.

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal pouvant stocker 14 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 6 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 18.

Muon Gold (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Muon gold is a lubricant-based spice that gives users intensified mental clarity and focus for a short time. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d4]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d4]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Muon gold

Muon gold is a lubricant-based spice that gives users intensified mental clarity and focus for a short time. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d3]]. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Panic dart

Shoulder Cannon (Fine).description:
Weapon (Shoulder Cannon)

Mounted in the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon. You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced shoulder cannon, which has the smart (16, +2) property.

 

Shoulder cannon

Auto

Weapons with this property can only fire in burst, penetrating, or rapid modes. If the weapon has any combination of burst, penetrating, and rapid modes, you choose which mode to use. You can only use one mode at a time.

Burst 8

When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with this property, you can instead spray a 10-foot-cube area within range with shots, consuming ammunition equal to the burst number. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts. Before you use this property, you can declare une créature that would be affected by it. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, in addition to the weapon's normal dégâts, it is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit. If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Power cell (range 60/240) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 8

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Smart (15/+2)

This weapon ignores your Dexterity score and bonus de maîtrise. Two numbers appear in parentheses with the property—the first is the weapon's Dexterity score, and the second is the weapon's bonus de maîtrise. The weapon uses these values instead of yours quand vous faites attack and jet de dégâtss with it. If you lack maîtrise with the weapon, the weapon does not benefit from its bonus de maîtrise.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Special

Mounted by the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Holocron (Ancient).name: Holocron (ancien)
Holocron (Ancient).description:
Adventuring Gear

This holocron contains a single 9th-niveau pouvoir de la Force, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 8 with a combined niveau no greater than 9. After meditating with the holocron for at least 80 hours, a forcecaster with a Max Power Niveau of 9th or higher can make a DD 30 forcecasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise based on the alignment of the power(s) stored within. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir de la Force(s), which does not count against their pouvoir de la Forces known and can not be unlearned except through use of a remove curse power. On a failure, the power is not learned and the forcecaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by Force-wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form.

 

Holocron

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by force wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form. They appear as palm-sized, glowing polyhedrons of crystalline material and hardware, and can only be activated and used through the power of the Force.

Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 20 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. A set of binders comes with one key. Breaking the binders requires a DD 26 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 26 test de Dextérité. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 24 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 13 and 60 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 12d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Security Spike (Superior).description:

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit de sécurité), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe (aucune action requise) pour obtenir l'avantage sur le test, puis vous pouvez relancer l'un des dés une fois. Mine, Flash (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Glitterstim (Fine).name: Glitterstim (Fin)
Glitterstim (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A silvery-green webbing sharp to the contact, yet when liquidized causes a heightened mental state and pleasurable boost. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution

jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Electrifying Dart (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Electrifying dart
