De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Snare (Fine).name: Caisse claire (bien)
Snare (Fine).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 14 Strength or test de Dextérité (la cible chooses the ability to use), freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The snare has an AC of 11, 10 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.

 

Snare

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 Strength or test de Dextérité (la cible chooses the ability to use), freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The snare has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.

Portable Teleporter Mk IV.name: Téléporteur portable Mk IV
Portable Teleporter Mk IV.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can use this teleporter to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 150 mètres away. These portals lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal.

Rocketpack (Exceptional).name: Rocketpack (Exceptionnel)
Rocketpack (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 45 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 9 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an enhanced integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute. You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with this enhanced rocket launcher.

 

Rocketpack

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 5 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute.

Blueprint (Advanced).name: Plan (avancé)
Blueprint (Advanced).description:
Adventuring Gear

Ce plan contient des informations concernant les matériaux bruts et rares, les outils et les étapes nécessaires pour fabriquer un objet de rareté avancée. Pendant 1 heure, ce qui peut être fait lors d'un tribunal de repos, un personnage peut tenter d'apprendre le plan. S'ils le font, ils doivent réaliser un test d'Intelligence DD 22 avec les outils appropriés. En cas de réussite, le plan de l'objet est appris. En cas d'échec, le plan n'est pas appris et le personnage doit attendre 24 heures avant de pouvoir réessayer.

Les plans contiennent les secrets de la fabrication d'objets de nature plus complexe.

Panic Collimator (Lethal).name: Collimateur de panique (mortel)
Panic Collimator (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 17 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 5, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 13 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Datacron Mk III.name: Datacron Mk III
Datacron Mk III.description:
Adventuring Gear

This datacron contains a single 3rd-niveau pouvoir technique, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 2 with a combined niveau no greater than 3. After tinkering with the datacron for at least 8 hours, a techcaster with a Max Power Niveau of 3rd or higher can make a DD 18 techcasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir technique(s), which does not count against their pouvoir techniques known. On a failure, the power is not learned and the techcaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Datacrons are encrypted storage devices that contain an interactive projection, and are used to store high-value, sensitive information.

 

Datacron

A datacron is a type of holocron that can be accessed by non-Force-sensitives and are mainly used to store encrypted data. They are complete with an interactive projection to access the information.

Strength Stim (Champion).name: Strength Stim (Champion)
Strength Stim (Champion).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Strength score increases by 10, and its maximum for this score increases by 10. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Net (Exceptional).name: Net (Exceptionnel)
Net (Exceptional).description:
Weapon (Net)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 17 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 14, 25 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

 

Net

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Thrown (range 15)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

Ring of Tech Storing Mk IV.name: Anneau de technologie stockant le Mk IV
Ring of Tech Storing Mk IV.description:
Adventuring Gear (Doigt)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke les techniques de pouvoir lancées dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que le porteur soit à l'écoute. les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 6 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d7]] - 1 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir stockées choisies par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer une technique de pouvoir du 1er au niveau 6 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que la technique du pouvoir est lancée. La technique du pouvoir n'a aucun effet, si ce n'est d'être stockée dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir la technique du pouvoir, la technique du pouvoir est dépensée sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer la technique de pouvoir détermine l'espace qu'elle utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quelle technique de pouvoir qui y est stockée. La technique du pouvoir utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde technologique, le bonus d'attaque technologique et la capacité de lancement technique du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traitée comme si vous lanciez la technique du pouvoir. La technique de pouvoir lancée depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stockée, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Grenade, Electrifying (Devastating).name: Grenade, électrisante (dévastatrice)
Grenade, Electrifying (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, electrifying

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Novanian Grog (Aged).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This grog features a pungent odor and a strong kick. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d8]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d8]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Novanian grog

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Mine, Plasma (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Mine, plasma

A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Vitapac (Improved).name: Vitapac (amélioré)
Vitapac (Improved).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

This fast-acting syringe grants a revitalizing boost. As an action, you can use this vitapac to restore expended Hit Dice to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature immediately regains five Hit Dice. If la créature has spent Hit Dice of different sizes, determine which Hit Dice are restored randomly.

Flechette Clip, Ion (Major).name: Clip Fléchette, Ion (Majeur)
Flechette Clip, Ion (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Flechette clip, ion

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Charge, Plasma (Lethal).name: Charge, Plasma (Métal)
Charge, Plasma (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d12]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, plasma

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Incendiary Cell (Lethal).name: Cellule incendiaire (létale)
Incendiary Cell (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced incendiary cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the incendiary cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d10]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Incendiary cell

An incendiary cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

S'ils le font, ils doivent réaliser un test d'Intelligence DD 18 avec les outils appropriés. En cas de réussite, le plan de l'objet est appris. En cas d'échec, le plan n'est pas appris et le personnage doit attendre 24 heures avant de pouvoir réessayer.

Les plans contiennent les secrets de la fabrication d'objets de nature plus complexe.

Grenade, Flash (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, flash

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Grenade Launcher (Exceptional).name: Grenades à lance (exceptionnelles)
Grenade Launcher (Exceptional).description:
Weapon (Grenade Launcher)

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don't meet the grenade launcher's strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total. You have a +3 bonus to the sauvegarde DD and deal one additional dégâts die with grenades fired by this enhanced grenade launcher.

 

Grenade launcher

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Special (range 90/360)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don—t meet the grenade launcher—s strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade—s explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Mine, Corrosive (Devastating).name: Mine, corrosive (dévastatrice)
Mine, Corrosive (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Mine, corrosive

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Viir Agathys's Armor.name: Armure de Viir Agathys
Viir Agathys's Armor.description:
Armure (Toutes)

Cette armure a 3 charges. Par une action, vous pouvez dépenser 1 ou plusieurs charges pour lancer la technique de pouvoir voltaic blinding, 1 charge par niveau. Toutes les charges dépensées sont récupérées une fois que vous avez terminé un repos long.

Cette armure exclusive fabriquée par le célèbre ingénieur Viir Agathys comprend un accès intégré à sa technique de pouvoir signature.

Novanian Grog (Reserve).name: Grog novanien (Réserve)
Novanian Grog (Reserve).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This grog features a pungent odor and a strong kick. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d10]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d10]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Novanian grog

This grog features a pungent odor and a strong kick. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Adventuring Gear (Body)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut héberger des modifications de rareté d'artefact ou inférieure.

Vambraces of the Outrider.name: Avant-bras de l'Outrider
Vambraces of the Outrider.description:
Adventuring Gear (Forearms)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in scout

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your scout niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. When you cast a pouvoir technique of niveau 1 or higher, you can expend one or more charges to reduce the pouvoir technique's cost by 1 per charge spent, to a minimum of 1.

When you reach niveau 5 in scout, you can maintain two targets of your Ranger's Quarry feature, instead of one. De plus, the reload value of the wrist launcher increases by 1, to 2.

When you reach niveau 11 in scout, when you are forced to make a concentration check by la cible of your Ranger's Quarry, you have avantage on the check and add your Intelligence modificateur to the roll. De plus, the reload value of the wrist launcher increases by 1, to 3.

When you reach niveau 17 in scout, when you miss with a tech or attaque d'arme, la cible takes dégâts equal to the attack's governing modificateur de caractéristique. If la cible of the attack is la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature, vous pouvez choisir to deal your Ranger's Quarry dégâts as well. De plus, the reload value of the wrist launcher increases by 1, to 4.

This pair of matching vambraces are inlaid with the etched visage of an eagle. One contains an integrated wristpad, while the other contains an integrated wrist launcher.

Ring of Ancient Force Storing.name: Anneau de stockage de force ancienne
Ring of Ancient Force Storing.description:
Adventuring Gear (Finger)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke le pouvoir de la Force lancé dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que l'harmonie soit accordée. le porteur les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 9 niveaux de pouvoir des Forces à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d10]] - 1 niveaux de pouvoir de la Force stockés choisis par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer un pouvoir de la Force du 1er au niveau 9 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que le pouvoir de la Force est lancé. Le pouvoir de la Force n'a d'autre effet que d'être stocké dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir le pouvoir de la Force, le pouvoir de la Force est dépensé sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer le pouvoir de la Force détermine l'espace qu'il utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quel pouvoir de la Force qui y est stocké. Le pouvoir de la Force utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde de force, le bonus d'attaque de force et la capacité de lancement forcé du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traité comme si vous lanciez le pouvoir de la Force. Le pouvoir de la Force lancé depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stocké, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Deuterium-pyro (Aged).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This alcoholic beverage, favored amongst ruffians, features a terrible flavor and strong aftertaste. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. Wristpad (Fine).name: Bracelet (bien)
Wristpad (Fine).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +1 aux jets d'attaque technique pour les techniques de pouvoir que vous lancez via ce bracelet.

Wristpad

A le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Focus Generator Chassis (Premium).name: Châssis du générateur de mise au point (Premium)
Focus Generator Chassis (Premium).description:
Focus (Force)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de générateur de mise au point modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du générateur de mise au point. Il peut abriter des modifications d’une rareté premium ou inférieure.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portatif utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Camtono (Exceptional).name: Camtono (Exceptionnel)
Camtono (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 27 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 9 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube, a un AC de 14 et 75 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les marchandises stockées à l'intérieur.

Camtono

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 15 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 10 et 15 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les biens stockés à l'intérieur.

Poison (Lethal).name: Poison (mortel)
Poison (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Poison)

As an action, you can use the poison in this vial to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. A creature hit by the empoisonné weapon must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 10d4]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

 

Poison

As an action, you can use the poison in this vial to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. A creature hit by the empoisonné weapon must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d4]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

Grenade, Deafening (Average).name: Grenade assourdissante (moyenne)
Grenade, Deafening (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, deafening

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Computer Spike (Champion).name: Spike informatique (Champion)
Computer Spike (Champion).description:
Consommable (Technologie)

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit du slicer), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe (aucune action requise) pour obtenir l'avantage sur le test, puis vous pouvez relancer les deux dés une fois. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser la pointe, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Pique d'ordinateur

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit de trancheur), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe. (aucune action requise) pour relancer le chèque. Vous devez utiliser le nouveau jet. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser le pic, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Portable Teleporter Mk VI.name: Téléporteur portable Mk VI
Portable Teleporter Mk VI.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can use this teleporter to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 1,000 mètres away. These portals lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal.

Mine, Ion (Devastating).name: Le mien, Ion (dévastateur)
Mine, Ion (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Mine, ion

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Smugglepack (Improved).name: Smugglepack (amélioré)
Smugglepack (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal pouvant stocker 13 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 7 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 21.

Smugglepack

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal qui stocke 15,00 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 15.

Slug Cartridge (Devastating).name: Cartouche anti-limaces (dévastatrice)
Slug Cartridge (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with this enhanced slug cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the slug cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Slug cartridge

Weapons with this property fire slug cartridges, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon.

Shoulder Cannon (Superior).name: Canon d'épaule (supérieur)
Shoulder Cannon (Superior).description:
Weapon (Shoulder Cannon)

Mounted in the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon. You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced shoulder cannon, which has the smart (18, +4) property.

 

Shoulder cannon

Auto

Weapons with this property can only fire in burst, penetrating, or rapid modes. If the weapon has any combination of burst, penetrating, and rapid modes, you choose which mode to use. You can only use one mode at a time.

Burst 8

When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with this property, you can instead spray a 10-foot-cube area within range with shots, consuming ammunition equal to the burst number. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts. Before you use this property, you can declare une créature that would be affected by it. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, in addition to the weapon's normal dégâts, it is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit. If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Power cell (range 60/240) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 8

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Smart (15/+2)

This weapon ignores your Dexterity score and bonus de maîtrise. Two numbers appear in parentheses with the property—the first is the weapon's Dexterity score, and the second is the weapon's bonus de maîtrise. The weapon uses these values instead of yours quand vous faites attack and jet de dégâtss with it. If you lack maîtrise with the weapon, the weapon does not benefit from its bonus de maîtrise.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Special

Mounted by the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Weapon (Champion).description:
Weapon (Any)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with this enhanced weapon.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Blueprint (Standard).name: Forfait (standard)
Blueprint (Standard).description:
Adventuring Gear

Ce plan contient des informations concernant les matériaux bruts et rares, les outils et les étapes nécessaires pour fabriquer un objet de rareté standard. Pendant 1 heure, ce qui peut être fait lors d'un tribunal de repos, un personnage peut tenter d'apprendre le plan. S'ils le font, ils doivent réaliser un test d'Intelligence DD 10 avec les outils appropriés. En cas de réussite, le plan de l'objet est appris. En cas d'échec, le plan n'est pas appris et le personnage doit attendre 24 heures avant de pouvoir réessayer.

Les plans contiennent les secrets de la fabrication d'objets de nature plus complexe.

Pants Chassis (Standard).name: Châssis de pantalon (standard)
Pants Chassis (Standard).description:
Équipement d'aventure (jambes)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté standard.

Deafening Dart (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Deafening dart

Wisdom Stim (Fine).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Wisdom score increases by 2, and its maximum for this score increases by 2. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Jetpack (Champion).name: Jetpack (Champion)
Jetpack (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 80 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 20 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

 

Jetpack

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 30 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 10 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Mine, Plasma (Deadly).description:

Panic Calibrator (Devastating).name: Calibrateur de panique (dévastateur)
Panic Calibrator (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 18 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases to 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Mandalorian Helmet.name: Casque Mandalorien
Mandalorian Helmet.description:
Adventuring Gear (Head)

Requires attunement

This helmet comes equipped with a headcomm and holorecorder. De plus, while wearing this helmet, you have darkvision out to 60 mètres.

Mandalorian Vestments. While wearing and attuned to this helmet and Mandalorian Beskar'gam, you have avantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight within 60 mètres. While wearing and attuned to this helmet, Mandalorian Beskar'gam, and Mandalorian Shuk'orok, you have avantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks within 5 mètres.

Featuring the iconic T-shaped visor of the Mandalorians, this helmet strikes fear into the hearts of the unwary.

Yarrock (Fine).name: Yarrock (Bien)
Yarrock (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yarrock is a hallucinogen which is said to instill a creature with a clear vision of "the meaning of life", granting a boost to confidence. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Yarrock

At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. Deuterium-pyro (Matured).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This alcoholic beverage, favored amongst ruffians, features a terrible flavor and strong aftertaste. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. Physical Barrier Mk I.name: Barrière physique Mk I
Physical Barrier Mk I.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 10 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of energy, ion, or kinetic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, la créature takes any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Rocket, Incendiary (Average).name: Fusée, incendiaire (moyenne)
Rocket, Incendiary (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced rocket launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 4d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Rocket, incendiary

This rocket launcher ammunition deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Ring of Tech Storing Mk III.name: Anneau de technologie stockant le Mk III
Ring of Tech Storing Mk III.description:
Adventuring Gear (Doigt)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke les techniques de pouvoir lancées dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que le porteur soit à l'écoute. les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 5 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d6]] - 1 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir stockées choisies par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer une technique de pouvoir du 1er au niveau 5 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que la technique du pouvoir est lancée. La technique du pouvoir n'a aucun effet, si ce n'est d'être stockée dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir la technique du pouvoir, la technique du pouvoir est dépensée sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer la technique de pouvoir détermine l'espace qu'elle utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quelle technique de pouvoir qui y est stockée. La technique du pouvoir utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde technologique, le bonus d'attaque technologique et la capacité de lancement technique du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traitée comme si vous lanciez la technique du pouvoir. La technique de pouvoir lancée depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stockée, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Tunic Chassis (Legendary).name: Châssis Tunique (Légendaire)
Tunic Chassis (Legendary).description:
Adventuring Gear (Body)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut abriter des modifications d'une rareté légendaire ou inférieure.

Panic Collimator (Average).name: Collimateur de panique (moyenne)
Panic Collimator (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 14 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 2, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic collimator
