Rocketpack (Champion).name: Rocketpack (Champion)
Rocketpack (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 50 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 10 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an enhanced integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute. You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with this enhanced rocket launcher.

 

Rocketpack

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 5 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute.

Projector Canister, Corrosive (Deadly).name: Cartouche de projecteur, corrosive (mortel)
Projector Canister, Corrosive (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 4d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, corrosive

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Deafening Collimator (Lethal).name: Collimateur assourdissant (mortel)
Deafening Collimator (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 17 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 5, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Deafening collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 13 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Armor (Champion).name: Armure (Champion)
Armor (Champion).description:
Armor (Any)

You have a +3 bonus to AC while wearing this armor. De plus, while wearing this armor, dégâts you take is reduced by 2. If this would reduce the dégâts to 0, the dégâts is instead reduced to 1.

Jensaarai Armor.name: Armure Jensaarai
Jensaarai Armor.description:
Armor (Any Medium)

Requires attunement

While wearing this armor, you are considered proficient regardless of whether or not you have maîtrise in medium armor. De plus, it grants a +1 bonus to AC.

Jensaarai Regalia. While wearing and attuned to this armor and Jensaarai Cloak, you are adapted to both hot and cold climates, as described in chapter 5 of the Dungeon Master's Guide. De plus, this armor now grants a +2 bonus to AC, instead of +1. While wearing and attuned to this armor, Jensaarai Cloak, and Jensaarai Headgear, this armor now grants a +3 bonus to AC, instead of +2.

At the height of their training, Jensaarai craft and bond with their own armor. While each set of armor is unique to its bearer, they share similar traits.

Charisma Stim (Superior).name: Charisma Stim (Superior)
Charisma Stim (Superior).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Charisma score increases by 6, and its maximum for this score increases by 6. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Cryo Cell (Average).name: Cellule cryo (moyenne)
Cryo Cell (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced cryo cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the cryo cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Cryo cell

A cryo cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Shoulder Cannon (Improved).name: Canon d'épaule (amélioré)
Shoulder Cannon (Improved).description:
Weapon (Shoulder Cannon)

Mounted in the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon. You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced shoulder cannon, which has the smart (17, +3) property.

 

Shoulder cannon

Auto

Weapons with this property can only fire in burst, penetrating, or rapid modes. If the weapon has any combination of burst, penetrating, and rapid modes, you choose which mode to use. You can only use one mode at a time.

Burst 8

When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with this property, you can instead spray a 10-foot-cube area within range with shots, consuming ammunition equal to the burst number. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts. Before you use this property, you can declare une créature that would be affected by it. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, in addition to the weapon's normal dégâts, it is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit. If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Power cell (range 60/240) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 8

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Smart (15/+2)

This weapon ignores your Dexterity score and bonus de maîtrise. Two numbers appear in parentheses with the property—the first is the weapon's Dexterity score, and the second is the weapon's bonus de maîtrise. The weapon uses these values instead of yours quand vous faites attack and jet de dégâtss with it. If you lack maîtrise with the weapon, the weapon does not benefit from its bonus de maîtrise.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Special

Mounted by the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Mine, Fragmentation (Major).name: Mine, Fragmentation (Majeur)
Mine, Fragmentation (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which activates at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Mine, fragmentation

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Mine, Panic (Lethal).name: Le mien, panique (mortel)
Mine, Panic (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, panic

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Medpac (Superior).name: Medpac (supérieur)
Medpac (Superior).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls four dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Medpac

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

Mag-lock Boots.name: Bottes à verrouillage magnétique
Mag-lock Boots.description:
Équipement d'aventure (pieds)

Pendant que vous portez ces bottes, vous pouvez activer ou désactiver les verrous magnétiques héritiers en guise de bonus d'action. Lorsque les verrous magnétiques sont engagés, vous vous déplacez à moitié vitesse, pouvez marcher sur n'importe quelle surface métallique solide, ignorer les terrains difficiles causés par des débris métalliques et ignorer les effets de la gravité (ou son absence), vous permettant ainsi de marcher sur des surfaces verticales ou même à l'envers.

La batterie de ces bottes dure au total 1 heure et se recharge à la fin d'une longue période de repos.

Mine, Deafening (Average).name: Le mien, assourdissant (moyen)
Mine, Deafening (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, deafening

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Gas Cartridge (Major).name: Cartouche de gaz (majeure)
Gas Cartridge (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced gas cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the gas cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

 

Gas cartridge

A gas cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

Charge, Fragmentation (Lethal).name: Charge, Fragmentation (Mortelle)
Charge, Fragmentation (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d12]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, fragmentation

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Vibroweapon Chassis (Standard).name: Châssis d'arme vibrante (standard)
Vibroweapon Chassis (Standard).description:
Arme (toute arme vibrante)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme vibrante modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes vibrantes. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté standard.

Net (Improved).name: Net (amélioré)
Net (Improved).description:
Weapon (Net)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 15 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 12, 15 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

 

Net

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Thrown (range 15)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

Dart (Major).name: Fléchette (majeure)
Dart (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit.

Power Cell (Major).name: Cellule de puissance (majeure)
Power Cell (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced power cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Circlet of Persistence.name: Cercle de persévérance
Circlet of Persistence.description:
Adventuring Gear (Head)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Prérequis : au moins 3 niveaux en consulaire

Cet objet peut contenir un nombre de charges égal à la moitié de votre niveau consulaire (arrondi au supérieur). Lorsque vous effectuez une mise en pension longue, cet objet récupère tous les frais manquants. Lorsque vous utilisez une option Force-Empowered Casting, vous pouvez dépenser des charges à la place des points de Forces.

Lorsque vous atteignez le niveau 5 en consulaire, lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction Récupération de Force, vous pouvez ajouter votre modificateur de Sagesse et de Charisme au nombre de points de Forces retrouvés, au lieu d'un seul.

Lorsque vous atteignez le niveau 11 en consulaire, vous pouvez ignorer les prérequis pour le pouvoir de la Forces qui sont d'un niveau inférieur à votre niveau de puissance maximum.

Lorsque vous atteignez le niveau 17 en consulaire, lorsque vous effectuez un jet de sauvegarde de Constitution pour maintenir votre concentration sur un pouvoir de la Force, vous pouvez ajouter votre modificateur de Sagesse ou de Charisme (votre choix, au minimum un) s'il n'inclut pas déjà ce modificateur.

Ce cercle en platine contient une pierre précieuse qui change de couleur au gré de son porteur.

Mine, Panic (Devastating).name: Mine, panique (dévastatrice)
Mine, Panic (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, panic

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Grenade, Panic (Average).name: Grenade, panique (moyenne)
Grenade, Panic (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, panic

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Missile, Ion (Average).name: Missile, Ion (moyenne)
Missile, Ion (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Missile, ion

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Ring of Tech Storing Mk V.name: Anneau de technologie stockant le Mk V
Ring of Tech Storing Mk V.description:
Adventuring Gear (Doigt)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke les techniques de pouvoir lancées dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que le porteur soit à l'écoute. les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 8 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d9]] - 1 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir stockées choisies par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer une technique de pouvoir du 1er au niveau 8 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que la technique du pouvoir est lancée. La technique du pouvoir n'a aucun effet, si ce n'est d'être stockée dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir la technique du pouvoir, la technique du pouvoir est dépensée sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer la technique de pouvoir détermine l'espace qu'elle utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quelle technique de pouvoir qui y est stockée. La technique du pouvoir utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde technologique, le bonus d'attaque technologique et la capacité de lancement technique du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traitée comme si vous lanciez la technique du pouvoir. La technique de pouvoir lancée depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stockée, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Electrifying Cartridge (Average).name: Cartouche électrisante (moyenne)
Electrifying Cartridge (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced electrifying cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the electrifying cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

 

Electrifying cartridge

Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

Flechette Mag, Fragmentation (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Flechette mag, fragmentation

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Credit Chip (Superior).name: Puce de crédit (supérieure)
Credit Chip (Superior).description:
Adventuring Gear

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par vérification du kit de trancheuse DD 24.

Puce de crédit

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par le contrôle du kit d'une trancheuse DD 15.

Andris (Uncut).name: Andris (non coupé)
Andris (Uncut).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Refined andris crystal, a spice mined most commonly on Sevarcos II, sharpens a creature's mind when smoked. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Andris

Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with this enhanced power generator. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power generator is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power generator

Power generators energize the blaster cannon.

Rocket Boots (Champion).name: Bottes de fusée (Champion)
Rocket Boots (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear (Feet)

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 50 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cell.

 

Rocket boots

Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Yarrock (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yarrock is a hallucinogen which is said to instill a creature with a clear vision of "the meaning of life", granting a boost to confidence. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Vous gagnez un bonus de +2 aux jets d'attaque de force pour le pouvoir de la Forces que vous lancez via ce générateur de focalisation.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portatif utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Raava (Aged).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Raava is a traditional liquor breed from zsajhira berries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Consumable (Ammunition)

A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Flechette clip, ion

Jensaarai Headgear.description:
Adventuring Gear (Head)

Requires attunement

While you are wearing this headgear, kinetic and energy dégâts that you take from unenhanced weapons is reduced by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Jensaarai Regalia. While wearing and attuned to this armor and Jensaarai Armor, this headgear no longer count towards your maximum attunement. While wearing and attuned to this headgear, Jensaarai Armor, and Jensaarai Cloak, fire, cold, and force dégâts you take is reduced by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Most Jensaarai craft a mask or helmet bearing the visage of an animal that best personifies their desires or goals.

Jedi Padawan's Robe.name: Robe de Padawan Jedi
Jedi Padawan's Robe.description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +1 à la CA pendant que vous portez ce vêtement. robe.

Les membres de l'Ordre Jedi portent généralement des vêtements simples ou sans prétention, n'offrant qu'un léger renforcement des défenses.

Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced electrifying cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the electrifying cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

 

Electrifying cartridge

Grenade, Cryo (Lethal).name: Grenade, cryo (létale)
Grenade, Cryo (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, cryo

Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Vibroweapon Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis Vibroweapon (Avancé)
Vibroweapon Chassis (Advanced).description:
Arme (toute arme vibrante)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme vibrante modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes vibrantes, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Slug Cartridge (Lethal).name: Cartouche anti-limaces (létale)
Slug Cartridge (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with this enhanced slug cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the slug cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Slug cartridge

Weapons with this property fire slug cartridges, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon.

Respiration Facilitator.name: Facilitateur de respiration
Respiration Facilitator.description:
Adventuring Gear (Neck)

Vous avez un avantage sur la Constitution jet de sauvegardes contre le pouvoir de la Forces.

Ce tour de cou a permis au célèbre chasseur de primes Cad Bane de contourner la fonction respiratoire normale. Lorsqu'il est porté, il donne à votre voix un son numérique plus profond.

Holocron (Apprentice).name: Holocron (apprenti)
Holocron (Apprentice).description:
Adventuring Gear

This holocron contains a single 1st-niveau pouvoir de la Force. After meditating with the holocron for at least 4 hours, a forcecaster with a Max Power Niveau of 1st or higher can make a DD 14 forcecasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise based on the alignment of the power stored within. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against their pouvoir de la Forces known and can not be unlearned except through use of a remove curse power. On a failure, the power is not learned and the forcecaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by Force-wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form.

 

Holocron

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by force wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form. They appear as palm-sized, glowing polyhedrons of crystalline material and hardware, and can only be activated and used through the power of the Force.

Flechette Clip, Plasma (Major).name: Clip Fléchette, Plasma (Majeur)
Flechette Clip, Plasma (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Flechette clip, plasma

Blueprint (Premium).name: Forfait (Premium)
Blueprint (Premium).description:
Adventuring Gear

Ce plan contient des informations concernant les matériaux bruts et rares, les outils et les étapes nécessaires pour fabriquer un objet d'une rareté premium. Pendant 1 heure, ce qui peut être fait lors d'un tribunal de repos, un personnage peut tenter d'apprendre le plan. S'ils le font, ils doivent réaliser un test d'Intelligence DD 14 avec les outils appropriés. En cas de réussite, le plan de l'objet est appris. En cas d'échec, le plan n'est pas appris et le personnage doit attendre 24 heures avant de pouvoir réessayer.

Les plans contiennent les secrets de la fabrication d'objets de nature plus complexe.

Flux Collimator (Major).name: Collimateur de flux (majeur)
Flux Collimator (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Flux collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

Corrosive Cartridge (Major).name: Cartouche corrosive (majeure)
Corrosive Cartridge (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced corrosive cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the corrosive cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Corrosive cartridge

Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Grenade, Fragmentation (Deadly).description:

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Grenade, fragmentation

A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Charric Rifle.name: Fusil Charric
Charric Rifle.description:
Weapon (Sniper Rifle)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss with this weapon. De plus, it has the disarming property, and when a creature tries to reduce the dégâts of a shot from this weapon with a feature or power, such as monk—s Deflect Missiles or the saber reflect pouvoir de la Force, they have disavantage on the reduction roll. Lastly, on a hit, if la cible is wearing heavy armor, it deals an additional [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts.

The proprietary Charric rifle was the standard issue weapon of all of the soldiers in the Chiss Expansionary Defense Force.

 

Sniper rifle

Power cell (range 150/600) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 2

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Strength 13

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Focus Generator Chassis (Standard).name: Châssis du générateur de mise au point (standard)
Focus Generator Chassis (Standard).description:
Focus (Force)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de générateur de mise au point modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du générateur de mise au point. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté standard.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portable utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Générateur de focalisation

Pauldron of Retribution.name: Espaulier du châtiment
Pauldron of Retribution.description:
Adventuring Gear (Shoulders)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in berserker

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your berserker niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. While raging, when you deal dégâts that would include your Rage Damage, you can expend one charge to double your Rage Damage bonus for that dégâts.

When you reach niveau 5 in berserker, quand vous utilisez your Reckless Attack feature, your critical hit range increases by 1.

When you reach niveau 11 in berserker, once per critical hit, when you roll maximum dégâts on a weapon dégâts die, you can roll an additional die and add both to the total.

When you reach niveau 17 in berserker, when you are conscious and fail a Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution jet de sauvegarde, vous pouvez choisir to instead succeed. Once you've done so, you must complete a short or repos long before you can do so again.

This single pauldron, which can be worn over armor, features the visage of a howling beast.

Strength Stim (Basic).name: Strength Stim (Basic)
Strength Stim (Basic).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Strength score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Spicebrew (Fine).name: Brasserie aux épices (fine)
Spicebrew (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Spicebrew, a popular drink across the galaxy, is a tanned alcoholic beverage topped with foam. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d4]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d4]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Spicebrew

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Alacrity Adrenal (Basic).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible's speed increases by 10 mètres. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Mummergy (Matured).name: Mummergy (affiné)
Mummergy (Matured).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Mummergy is a strong-smelling liquor derived from a plant of the same name. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Mummergy

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Torchy.name: Torchie
Torchy.description:
Weapon (Blaster Pistol)

You gain a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss with this enhanced weapon, and quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme à distance using this weapon, la créature takes an extra [[/r 1d4]] energy dégâts for each size category larger than you it is (up to [[/r 3d4]] extra dégâts).

Torchy is a BlasTech ALT-25 blaster pistol owned by the mercenary Corso Riggs during the Galactic Cold War.

 

Blaster pistol

Power cell (range 50/200) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 16

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Sith Strength Belt.name: Sith Strength Belt
Sith Strength Belt.description:
Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Lorsque vous portez cette ceinture, votre score de force devient 27. Si votre force est déjà égale ou supérieure à 27, elle n'a aucun effet sur vous.

Portée sur les jambes, la taille et le bas du dos, cette ceinture augmente considérablement la puissance physique de l'utilisateur grâce à un ensemble d'actionneurs lourds en acier dur ainsi qu'un système de surveillance synaptique qui réagit aux mouvements de son utilisateur avec des réponses de puissance optimisées.

Mine, Cryo (Deadly).name: Le mien, Cryo (mortel)
Mine, Cryo (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, cryo

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Vitapac (Fine).name: Vitapac (Bien)
Vitapac (Fine).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

This fast-acting syringe grants a revitalizing boost. As an action, you can use this vitapac to restore expended Hit Dice to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature immediately regains three Hit Dice. If la créature has spent Hit Dice of different sizes, determine which Hit Dice are restored randomly.

Wristpad Chassis (Artifact).name: Châssis du bracelet (artefact)
Wristpad Chassis (Artifact).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bracelet modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du poignet, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut accueillir des modifications de rareté d'artefact ou inférieure.

Wristpad

A Le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Mine, Gas (Average).name: Mine, Gaz (Moyenne)
Mine, Gas (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine fills the air in a 15-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 4d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

Smugglepack (Exceptional).name: Smugglepack (Exceptionnel)
Smugglepack (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal pouvant stocker 11 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 9 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 27.

Smugglepack

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal qui stocke 15,00 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 15.

Power Generator (Deadly).name: Générateur d'énergie (mortel)
Power Generator (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced power generator. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power generator is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power generator

Power generators energize the blaster cannon.

Thermal Detonator (Major).name: Détonateur thermique (majeur)
Thermal Detonator (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Thermal detonators are unique in that can only be turned off by whoever turned them on. They can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d6]] fire and [[/r 6d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

 

Thermal detonator

Projector Canister, Incendiary (Devastat.name: Cartouche de projecteur, incendiaire (dévastateur)
Projector Canister, Incendiary (Devastat.description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 6d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, incendiary

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Aratech Echo Belt.name: Ceinture d'écho Aratech
Aratech Echo Belt.description:
Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Pendant que vous portez cette ceinture avec son champ, la Sagesse (Perception) les contrôles effectués pour voir que vous avez un désavantage, et vous avez un avantage sur les contrôles de Dextérité (Furtivité) faits pour vous cacher, car la ceinture s'éclaire autour de vous. L'activation ou la désactivation de la ceinture entraîne une action.

Le succès de ce générateur de champ furtif haut de gamme a encouragé Aratech à se lancer dans d'autres matériels.

Sith Acolyte's Robe.name: Robe d'acolyte Sith
Sith Acolyte's Robe.description:
Adventuring Gear (Body)

Requires attunement

You gain a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss with weapons and pouvoir de la Forces while you wear this robe.

Designed for those who relish personal combat, and know that power comes to those who take it, these robes augment offensive capabilities with no hindrance to movement.

Dart (Lethal).name: Fléchette (Mortelle)
Dart (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with this enhanced wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit.

Stamina Adrenal (Fine).name: Endurance surrénalienne (bien)
Stamina Adrenal (Fine).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible's current and maximum points de vie increase by 20. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Pants Chassis (Premium).name: Châssis de pantalon (Premium)
Pants Chassis (Premium).description:
Équipement d'aventure (jambes)

Computer Spike (Fine).name: Spike informatique (bien)
Computer Spike (Fine).description:
Consommable (Technologie)

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit du slicer), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe (aucune action requise) pour obtenir l'avantage sur le test. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser la pointe, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Pique d'ordinateur

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit de trancheur), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe. (aucune action requise) pour relancer le chèque. Vous devez utiliser le nouveau jet. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser le pic, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Glitterstim (High Quality).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A silvery-green webbing sharp to the contact, yet when liquidized causes a heightened mental state and pleasurable boost. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Bolas (Improved).name: Bolas (amélioré)
Bolas (Improved).description:
Weapon (Bolas)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 15 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 12, 15 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

 

Bolas

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 20/60)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Charge, Fragmentation (Average).name: Charge, fragmentation (moyenne)
Charge, Fragmentation (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, fragmentation

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Aratech Sound Dampening Boots.name: Bottes insonorisantes Aratech
Aratech Sound Dampening Boots.description:
Équipement d'aventure (pieds)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Pendant que vous portez ces bottes, vos pas ne font aucun bruit, quelle que soit la surface sur laquelle vous se déplacent. Vous bénéficiez également d'un avantage sur les tests de Dextérité (Discrétion) qui reposent sur un déplacement silencieux.

Avant que leur répulsorcraft ne fasse un tabac, Aratech a perfectionné son avance sur le marché des générateurs de champ furtifs.

Mine, Incendiary (Devastating).name: Mine, incendiaire (dévastatrice)
Mine, Incendiary (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

 

Mine, incendiary

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Projector Canister, Cryo (Lethal).name: Cartouche de projecteur, Cryo (létale)
Projector Canister, Cryo (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 5d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, cryo

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Andris (Pure).name: Andris (Pur)
Andris (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Refined andris crystal, a spice mined most commonly on Sevarcos II, sharpens a creature's mind when smoked. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Andris

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Tsiraki (Special).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Tsiraki is a blue-colored alcoholic beverage crafted from fermented salakberries and pickling spices. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tsiraki
