At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Tool (Superior).name: Outil (supérieur)
Tool (Superior).description:
Adventuring Gear

Your level of maîtrise in these tools increases by four steps (to expertise, from trained to mastery, from proficient to high mastery, or from expertise to grand mastery).

Flechette Mag, Ion (Lethal).name: Fléchette Mag, Ion (Métal)
Flechette Mag, Ion (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Flechette mag, ion

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Flechette Mag, Plasma (Lethal).name: Fléchette Mag, Plasma (Métal)
Flechette Mag, Plasma (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Flechette mag, plasma

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Tunic Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis Tunique (Avancé)
Tunic Chassis (Advanced).description:
Adventuring Gear (Body)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements, ainsi qu'une augmentation fente. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Shoulder Cannon (Exceptional).name: Canon d'épaule (exceptionnel)
Shoulder Cannon (Exceptional).description:
Weapon (Shoulder Cannon)

Mounted in the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon. You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with this enhanced shoulder cannon, which has the smart (19, +5) property.

 

Shoulder cannon

Auto

Weapons with this property can only fire in burst, penetrating, or rapid modes. If the weapon has any combination of burst, penetrating, and rapid modes, you choose which mode to use. You can only use one mode at a time.

Burst 8

When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with this property, you can instead spray a 10-foot-cube area within range with shots, consuming ammunition equal to the burst number. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts. Before you use this property, you can declare une créature that would be affected by it. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, in addition to the weapon's normal dégâts, it is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit. If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde.

Power cell (range 60/240) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 8

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Smart (15/+2)

This weapon ignores your Dexterity score and bonus de maîtrise. Two numbers appear in parentheses with the property—the first is the weapon's Dexterity score, and the second is the weapon's bonus de maîtrise. The weapon uses these values instead of yours quand vous faites attack and jet de dégâtss with it. If you lack maîtrise with the weapon, the weapon does not benefit from its bonus de maîtrise.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Special

Mounted by the shoulder slot, a shoulder cannon does not require a free hand to use. De plus, you have avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Handwraps (Superior).name: Bandages (supérieur)
Handwraps (Superior).description:
Weapon (Unarmed Strike)

While wearing these handwraps, you have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with your unarmed strikes.

Restraining Bolt (Fine).name: Boulon de retenue (fin)
Restraining Bolt (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de forcer son obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 16 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

Boulon de retenue

Les boulons de retenue sont de petits dispositifs cylindriques qui peuvent être apposés sur un droïde afin de limiter ses fonctions et de renforcer son l'obéissance. Une fois inséré, un boulon de retenue restreint le droïde de tout mouvement que son maître ne souhaite pas, et l'oblige également à répondre aux signaux produits par une unité de commande portative.

L'installation d'un boulon de retenue prend 1 minute. Le droïde doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde DD 14 Constitution. Un droïde hostile effectue cette sauvegarde avec avantage. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, le boulon de retenue se surcharge et devient inutile. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, le boulon de retenue est correctement installé et l'unité de contrôle peut être utilisée pour contrôler activement le droïde. Lorsque l'unité de contrôle est inactive, le droïde peut agir librement mais il ne peut pas tenter de retirer le boulon de retenue.

Clothes, Clandestine (Superior).name: Vêtements clandestins (supérieur)
Clothes, Clandestine (Superior).description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Ces vêtements sont livrés avec six poches cachées, chacune pouvant contenir jusqu'à 1 lb. Trouver ces poches cachées nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 24.

Vêtements clandestins

Ces vêtements sont livrés avec deux poches cachées, chacune pouvant contenir jusqu'à 1,00 lb. Trouver ces poches cachées nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 15.

Karrak (Uncut).name: Karrak (non coupé)
Karrak (Uncut).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d6]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d6]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Karrak

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. Slug Cartridge (Major).name: Cartouche anti-limaces (majeure)
Slug Cartridge (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced slug cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the slug cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Slug cartridge

Weapons with this property fire slug cartridges, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon.

Shield Chassis (Premium).name: Châssis de bouclier (Premium)
Shield Chassis (Premium).description:
Bouclier (tous)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Security Spike (Champion).name: Spike de sécurité (Champion)
Security Spike (Champion).description:
Consommable (technologie)

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit de sécurité), vous pouvez utiliser le pic (aucune action requise) pour obtenir l'avantage sur le test, puis vous pouvez relancer les deux dés une fois. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser le pic, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le contrôle réussit ou échoue.

Pique de sécurité

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit de sécurité), vous pouvez utiliser le pic (aucune action requis) pour relancer le chèque. Vous devez utiliser le nouveau jet. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser le pic, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Grenade, Corrosive (Deadly).name: Grenade corrosive (mortel)
Grenade, Corrosive (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Remote Detonator (Exceptional).name: Détonateur à distance (exceptionnel)
Remote Detonator (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to ten mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 300 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

 

Remote detonator

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to two mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 30 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

Handwraps (Basic).name: Bandages (de base)
Handwraps (Basic).description:
Weapon (Unarmed Strike)

At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Panic Dart (Lethal).name: Fléchette de panique (mortelle)
Panic Dart (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Panic dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Portable Teleporter Mk I.name: Téléporteur portable Mk I
Portable Teleporter Mk I.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can use this teleporter to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 30 mètres away. These portals lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal.

Gas Cartridge (Average).name: Cartouche de gaz (moyenne)
Gas Cartridge (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced gas cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the gas cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

 

Gas cartridge

A gas cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

Yaladai (Pure).name: Yaladaï (Pur)
Yaladai (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yaladai is a powerful stimulant that grants extreme clarity, improving relaxation and focus. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d12]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d12]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Boots of Bounding.name: Bottes d'envahissement
Boots of Bounding.description:
Adventuring Gear (Feet)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in fighter

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your fighter niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. On your turn, you can expend 1 or more charges to engage the rocket boosters and leap to a space you can see. For each charge spent, you can move up to 10 mètres. Any attaque d'opportunités you provoke with this movement are made with disavantage.

When you reach niveau 5 in fighter, quand vous utilisez your Action Surge feature, your vitesse de déplacement is doubled for the turn, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed jusqu'à la fin de votre tour, though you fall if you end your speed in the air and nothing else is holding you aloft, and attaque d'opportunités made against you this turn have disavantage.

When you reach niveau 11 in fighter, quand vous utilisez your Indomitable feature, you have avantage on the roll.

When you reach niveau 17 in fighter, once per round, when you miss with a attaque d'arme, you can repeat the attack (no action required).

These red and black boots come with integrated rocket boosters.

Mine, Flash (Major).name: Le mien, Flash (majeur)
Mine, Flash (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 4d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

Grenade, Corrosive (Lethal).name: Grenade corrosive (mortelle)
Grenade, Corrosive (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Grenade, corrosive

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Ring of Journeyman Force Storing.name: Anneau de stockage de force du compagnon
Ring of Journeyman Force Storing.description:
Adventuring Gear (Finger)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke le pouvoir de la Force lancé dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que l'harmonie soit accordée. le porteur les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 5 niveaux de pouvoir de la Forces à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d6]] - 1 niveaux de pouvoir de la Force stockés choisis par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer un pouvoir de la Force du 1er au niveau 5 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que le pouvoir de la Force est lancé. Le pouvoir de la Force n'a d'autre effet que d'être stocké dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir le pouvoir de la Force, le pouvoir de la Force est dépensé sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer le pouvoir de la Force détermine l'espace qu'il utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quel pouvoir de la Force qui y est stocké. Le pouvoir de la Force utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde de force, le bonus d'attaque de force et la capacité de lancement forcé du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traité comme si vous lanciez le pouvoir de la Force. Le pouvoir de la Force lancé depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stocké, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Credit Chip (Exceptional).name: Puce de crédit (exceptionnelle)
Credit Chip (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par vérification du kit de trancheuse DD 27.

Puce de crédit

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par le contrôle du kit d'une trancheuse DD 15.

Taozin Amulet.name: Amulette Taozin
Taozin Amulet.description:
Équipement d'aventure (cou)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Lorsque vous portez cette amulette, vous êtes caché de la détection par la Force. Vous ne pouvez pas être ciblé par le pouvoir de la Force ou par des fonctionnalités qui détecteraient la présence de la Force en vous, et les fonctionnalités qui détecteraient votre harmonisation avec la Force vous montrent une lueur jaune pâle.

Fabriquée à partir de la peau d'un taozin, cette amulette brouille et obscurcit les sens de la Force afin que leurs porteurs ne puissent pas être facilement détectés par un autre. Sensible à la force.

De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 6d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Vibroweapon Chassis (Legendary).description:
Arme (toute arme vibrante)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme vibrante modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes vibrantes, ainsi que deux emplacements d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications d'une rareté légendaire ou inférieure.

Charge, Fragmentation (Major).name: Charge, Fragmentation (Majeur)
Charge, Fragmentation (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d8]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, fragmentation

Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Datacron Mk II.name: Datacron Mk II
Datacron Mk II.description:
Adventuring Gear

This datacron contains a single 1st-niveau pouvoir technique. After tinkering with the datacron for at least 4 hours, a techcaster with a Max Power Niveau of 1st or higher can make a DD 14 techcasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir technique, which does not count against their pouvoir techniques known. On a failure, the power is not learned and the techcaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Datacrons are encrypted storage devices that contain an interactive projection, and are used to store high-value, sensitive information.

 

Datacron

A datacron is a type of holocron that can be accessed by non-Force-sensitives and are mainly used to store encrypted data. They are complete with an interactive projection to access the information.

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, flash

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is aveuglé pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Vitapac (Basic).name: Vitapac (Basique)
Vitapac (Basic).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

This fast-acting syringe grants a revitalizing boost. As an action, you can use this vitapac to restore expended Hit Dice to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature immediately regains two Hit Dice. If la créature has spent Hit Dice of different sizes, determine which Hit Dice are restored randomly.

Stamina Adrenal (Improved).name: Endurance surrénale (améliorée)
Stamina Adrenal (Improved).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible's current and maximum points de vie increase by 30. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Corrosive Cartridge (Devastating).name: Cartouche corrosive (dévastatrice)
Corrosive Cartridge (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced corrosive cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the corrosive cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d12]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Corrosive cartridge

A corrosive cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Holocron (Novice).name: Holocron (débutant)
Holocron (Novice).description:
Adventuring Gear

This holocron contains a single at-will pouvoir de la Force. After meditating with the holocron for at least 2 hours, a forcecaster with a Max Power Niveau of 1st or higher can make a DD 10 forcecasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise based on the alignment of the power stored within. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against their pouvoir de la Forces known and can not be unlearned except through use of a remove curse power. On a failure, the power is not learned and the forcecaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by Force-wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form.

 

Holocron

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by force wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form. They appear as palm-sized, glowing polyhedrons of crystalline material and hardware, and can only be activated and used through the power of the Force.

Flightsuit.name: Combinaison de vol
Flightsuit.description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Bien que vous ne portiez aucune armure, ce vêtement a la propriété imperméable 2 (combinaison spatiale, combinaison de plongée).

Armor Chassis (Legendary).name: Châssis blindé (légendaire)
Armor Chassis (Legendary).description:
Armure (Tout)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'armure modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications d'armure, ainsi que deux emplacements d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications d'une rareté légendaire ou inférieure.

Battle Adrenal Mk I.name: Combat surrénalien Mk I
Battle Adrenal Mk I.description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, when la cible takes the Attack action, it can make one additional attack (no action required). Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Projector Canister, Corrosive (Major).name: Cartouche de projecteur, corrosif (majeur)
Projector Canister, Corrosive (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 3d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, corrosive

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Shield Chassis (Artifact).name: Châssis de bouclier (artefact)
Shield Chassis (Artifact).description:
Bouclier (tous)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bouclier modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications d'armure, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut héberger des modifications de rareté d'artefact ou inférieure.

Mine, Corrosive (Average).name: Le mien, corrosif (moyenne)
Mine, Corrosive (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Mine, corrosive

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Vibroweapon Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis d'arme vibrante (prototype)
Vibroweapon Chassis (Prototype).description:
Arme (toute arme vibrante)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme vibrante modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes vibrantes, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté de prototype ou inférieure.

Constitution Stim (Basic).name: Constitution Stim (Basic)
Constitution Stim (Basic).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Constitution score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Charge, Plasma (Devastating).name: Charge, Plasma (Dévastateur)
Charge, Plasma (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d20]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, plasma

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Panic Calibrator (Average).name: Calibrateur de panique (moyenne)
Panic Calibrator (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 14 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 2, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Panic calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the neuralizing 13 property. If it already has the neuralizing property, its neuralizing number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Stamina Adrenal (Basic).name: Endurance surrénale (de base)
Stamina Adrenal (Basic).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible's current and maximum points de vie increase by 10. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Gauntlets of the Warrior.name: Gantelets du guerrier
Gauntlets of the Warrior.description:
Adventuring Gear (Hands)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in guardian

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your guardian niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. When you would use your Force-Empowered Strikes feature, you can expend charges instead of point de Forces.

When you reach niveau 5 in guardian, when you roll a dégâts die for your Force-Empowered Strikes or Improved Force-Empowered Strikes feature, if you roll less than your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice), you can use the chosen modificateur instead of the result on the die.

When you reach niveau 11 in guardian, the radius of your Guardian Auras increases by 10 mètres. De plus, quand vous utilisez your Cause Harm or Lend Aid feature, you can add both your Wisdom and Charisma modificateur, instead of just one.

When you reach niveau 17 in guardian, une fois par tour, when you roll the maximum on a dégâts die for your Force-Empowered Strikes or Improved Force-Empowered Strikes feature, you regain a use of your Channel the Force, to a maximum of your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one).

These metallic gauntlets are decorated with ornate, sweeping symbols, and are each inlaid with six precious stones of varying colors.

Grenade, Stun (Deadly).name: Grenade paralysante (mortel)
Grenade, Stun (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, stun

As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Raava (Special).name: Raava (Spécial)
Raava (Special).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Raava is a traditional liquor breed from zsajhira berries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Raava

Raava is a traditional liquor breed from zsajhira berries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Gas Cartridge (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced gas cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the gas cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

 

Gas cartridge

Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 4, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

Charric Pistol.name: Pistolet Charric
Charric Pistol.description:
Weapon (Blaster Pistol)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss with this weapon. De plus, it has the disarming property, and when a creature tries to reduce the dégâts of a shot from this weapon with a feature or power, such as monk—s Deflect Missiles or the saber reflect pouvoir de la Force, they have disavantage on the reduction roll. Lastly, on a hit, if la cible is wearing heavy armor, it deals an additional [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts.

The proprietary Charric pistol was the standard issue weapon of all of the soldiers in the Chiss Expansionary Defense Force.

 

Blaster pistol

Power cell (range 50/200) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 16

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Mine, Ion (Average).name: Le mien, Ion (moyen)
Mine, Ion (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Rocket, incendiary

Shield (Fine).name: Bouclier (Bien)
Shield (Fine).description:
Bouclier (Tous)

Vous bénéficiez d'un bonus de +1 à la CA lorsque vous utilisez ce bouclier.

Yarrock (Uncut).name: Yarrock (non coupé)
Yarrock (Uncut).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yarrock is a hallucinogen which is said to instill a creature with a clear vision of "the meaning of life", granting a boost to confidence. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Poison (Deadly).name: Poison (mortel)
Poison (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Poison)

As an action, you can use the poison in this vial to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. A creature hit by the empoisonné weapon must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 8d4]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

Karrak (High Quality).name: Karrak (haute qualité)
Karrak (High Quality).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d8]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d8]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Karrak

A powerful painkiller, karrak allows creatures to continue through the most grievous injuries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Alacrity Adrenal (Improved).name: Alacrité surrénalienne (améliorée)
Alacrity Adrenal (Improved).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible's speed increases by 30 mètres. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Torpedo Launcher (Improved).name: Lance-torpilles (amélioré)
Torpedo Launcher (Improved).description:
Weapon (Torpedo Launcher)

You have a +2 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced weapon. De plus, the dégâts of torpedoes fired by this weapon increases by two steps (from [[/r d4]] to [[/r d8]], [[/r d6]] to [[/r d10]], [[/r d8]] to [[/r d12]], or [[/r d10]] to [[/r d20]]). If this would increase the dégâts die above a [[/r d20]], instead add an additional five dice to the torpedo's dégâts for each step above a [[/r d20]].

 

Torpedo launcher

Special (range 1200/3600)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the torpedo launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of torpedoes. Torpedo launchers have avantage on attack rolls against Gargantuan creatures and disavantage on attack rolls against Large and smaller creatures. Unlike other weapons, the torpedo launcher can only be loaded using an action, and you don't add your Dexterity modificateur to jet de dégâtss you make with it.

The torpedo launcher requires the use of a tripod, which is included in the price. Over the course of 1 minute, you can deploy or collapse the torpedo launcher on the tripod. While deployed, your speed is reduced to 0.

Sparkles.name: Paillettes
Sparkles.description:
Weapon (Light Pistol)

When you roll a 20 on an attack roll with this weapon, or hit a creature that has not yet acted during your first turn in combat, you deal an additional [[/r 1d4]] energy dégâts.

Sparkles is a BlasTech CS-14 light pistol owned by the mercenary Corso Riggs during the Galactic Cold War.

 

Light pistol

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Power cell (range 40/160) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 8

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Grenade, Plasma (Average).name: Grenade, Plasma (Moyenne)
Grenade, Plasma (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust.

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 35 mètres. A creature takes [[/r 10d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. Snare (Superior).name: Caisse claire (supérieure)
Snare (Superior).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. The snare has an AC of 13, 20 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.

 

Snare

Adventuring Gear

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to eight mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 150 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.
