When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Mandalorian Shuk'orok.name: Shuk'orok Mandalorien
Mandalorian Shuk'orok.description:
Adventuring Gear (Hands)

Requires attunement

While wearing these gloves, your Strength score becomes 21. If your Strength is already equal to or greater than 21, it has no effect on you.

Mandalorian Vestments. While wearing and attuned to these gloves and Mandalorian Beskar'gam, these gauntlets no longer count towards your maximum attunement. While wearing and attuned to these gloves, Mandalorian Beskar'gam, and Mandalorian Helmet, you have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts from unenhanced sources.

The final piece of a Mandalorian's armor, these gauntlets grant augmented strength.

Snare (Improved).name: Caisse claire (améliorée)
Snare (Improved).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 16 Strength or test de Dextérité (la cible chooses the ability to use), freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The snare has an AC of 12, 15 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.

 

Snare

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 Strength or test de Dextérité (la cible chooses the ability to use), freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The snare has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.

Mummergy (Fine).name: Mummergy (Bien)
Mummergy (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Mummergy is a strong-smelling liquor derived from a plant of the same name. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Mummergy

Mummergy is a strong-smelling liquor derived from a plant of the same name. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Defel Mimicker.name: Mimicker Defel
Defel Mimicker.description:
Adventuring Gear (Waist)

Requires attunement

While you wear this belt, it casts a shadow that makes you appear to be standing in a place near your actual location, causing any creature to have disavantage on attack rolls against you. If you take dégâts, the property ceases to function jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. This property is suppressed while you are incapacitated, entravé, or otherwise unable to move.

The only visible trace of this stealth field generator's user is a vague shadow, much like the Defel themselves.

Flechette Clip, Fragmentation (Deadly).name: Clip Fléchette, Fragmentation (Mortel)
Flechette Clip, Fragmentation (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Flechette clip, fragmentation

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Flechette Mag, Ion (Deadly).name: Fléchette Mag, Ion (Mortel)
Flechette Mag, Ion (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 5d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Flechette mag, ion

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Bolas (Superior).name: Bolas (Supérieur)
Bolas (Superior).description:
Weapon (Bolas)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 16 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 13, 20 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

 

Bolas

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 20/60)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Deuterium-pyro (Special).name: Deutérium-pyro (Spécial)
Deuterium-pyro (Special).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This alcoholic beverage, favored amongst ruffians, features a terrible flavor and strong aftertaste. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Deuterium-pyro

This alcoholic beverage, favored amongst ruffians, features a terrible flavor and strong aftertaste. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Cowl of the Professional.name: Capot du professionnel
Cowl of the Professional.description:
Adventuring Gear (Shoulders)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in operative

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your operative niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts, you can spend charges to reroll any number of dice and use either result.

When you reach niveau 5 in operative, while the hood is drawn, creatures can't see within the hood's confines unless you choose to allow it, you are in a source of enhanced light, or la créatures possess truesight. De plus, you have resistance to all dégâts until the end of your first turn.

When you reach niveau 11 in operative, quand vous utilisez your Uncanny Dodge feature, an illusory duplicate of yourpersonnelle appears in your space jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. The first attack roll made against you before the start of your next turn has disavantage.

When you reach niveau 17 in operative, when you are conscious and fail an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma jet de sauvegarde, vous pouvez choisir to instead succeed. Once you've done so, you must complete a short or repos long before you can do so again.

The color of this hood shifts between light gray and black depending on light.

Adapted Armor.name: Armure adaptée
Adapted Armor.description:
Armor (Any)

Requires attunement

You have resistance to one type of dégâts while you wear this armor. The DM chooses the type or determines it randomly from the options below.

| [[/r d10]] | Damage Type |

|:---:|:------------|

| 1 | Acid |

| 2 | Cold |

| 3 | Fire |

| 4 | Force |

| 5 | Ion |

| [[/r d10]] | Damage Type |

|:---:|:------------|

| 6 | Lightning |

| 7 | Necrotic |

| 8 | Poison |

| 9 | Psychic |

| 10 | Sonic |

Those foolhardy enough to not treat a hostile planet as worthy a foe as the ones carrying blasters don't often live long enough to boast about it.

Grenade, Ion (Average).name: Grenade, Ion (moyenne)
Grenade, Ion (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Grenade, ion

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius are disabled until rebooted.

Charisma Stim (Fine).name: Charisma Stim (Fine)
Charisma Stim (Fine).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Charisma score increases by 2, and its maximum for this score increases by 2. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Darkvision Goggles.name: Lunettes de vision dans le noir
Darkvision Goggles.description:
Adventuring Gear (Head)

While wearing these goggles, you have darkvision to a range of 60 mètres. If you already have darkvision, these goggles increase its range by 30 mètres.

Cloak Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis de cape (prototype)
Cloak Chassis (Prototype).description:
Équipement d'aventure (épaules)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements, ainsi qu'une augmentation fente. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté de prototype ou inférieure.

Cryo Cell (Deadly).name: Cellule cryogénique (mortel)
Cryo Cell (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced cryo cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the cryo cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Cryo cell

A cryo cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Grenade, Deafening (Devastating).name: Grenade, assourdissante (dévastatrice)
Grenade, Deafening (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, deafening

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Binders (Exceptional).name: Classeurs (Exceptionnels)
Binders (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 22 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. A set of binders comes with one key. Breaking the binders requires a DD 28 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 28 test de Dextérité. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 27 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 14 and 75 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

 

Binders

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 14 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. Breaking the binders requires a DD 20 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 20 test de Dextérité. A set of binders comes with one key. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 15 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 10 and 15 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

Darksaber.name: Sabre noir
Darksaber.description:
Weapon (Martial Lightsaber)

Requires attunement

You gain a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced lightsaber. De plus, the weapon ignores resistance to energy dégâts.

When you attack a creature that has at least one head with this weapon and roll a 20 on the attack roll, you cut off one of la créature's heads. The creature dies if it can't survive without the lost head. A creature is immune to this effect if it is immune to energy dégâts, doesn't have or need a head, has legendary actions, or the GM decides that la créature is too big for its head to be cut off with this weapon. Such a creature instead takes an extra [[/r 6d6]] energy dégâts from the hit.

The Darksaber was an ancient and unique black-bladed lightsaber created by Tarre Vizsla, the first Mandalorian ever inducted into the Jedi Order. It features a distinctly Mandalorian hilt and an ominous black blade.

 

Martial lightsaber

Hidden

You have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal a weapon with this property.

Luminous

A weapon with this property sheds dim light in a rayon de 1,5 mètre while activated. De plus, Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while the weapon is activated have disavantage.

Versatile ([[/r 1d10]])

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Dexterity Stim (Superior).name: Dexterity Stim (Superior)
Dexterity Stim (Superior).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Dexterity score increases by 6, and its maximum for this score increases by 6. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Torpedo Launcher (Superior).name: Lance-torpilles (supérieur)
Torpedo Launcher (Superior).description:
Weapon (Torpedo Launcher)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced weapon. De plus, the dégâts of torpedoes fired by this weapon increases by three steps (from [[/r d4]] to [[/r d10]], [[/r d6]] to [[/r d12]], or [[/r d8]] to [[/r d20]]). If this would increase the dégâts die above a [[/r d20]], instead add an additional five dice to the torpedo's dégâts for each step above a [[/r d20]].

 

Torpedo launcher

Special (range 1200/3600)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the torpedo launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of torpedoes. Torpedo launchers have avantage on attack rolls against Gargantuan creatures and disavantage on attack rolls against Large and smaller creatures. Unlike other weapons, the torpedo launcher can only be loaded using an action, and you don't add your Dexterity modificateur to jet de dégâtss you make with it.

The torpedo launcher requires the use of a tripod, which is included in the price. Over the course of 1 minute, you can deploy or collapse the torpedo launcher on the tripod. While deployed, your speed is reduced to 0.

Bolas (Champion).name: Bolas (Champion)
Bolas (Champion).description:
Weapon (Bolas)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 18 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 15, 30 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Vitapac (Superior).name: Vitapac (Supérieur)
Vitapac (Superior).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

This fast-acting syringe grants a revitalizing boost. As an action, you can use this vitapac to restore expended Hit Dice to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature immediately regains six Hit Dice. If la créature has spent Hit Dice of different sizes, determine which Hit Dice are restored randomly.

Electrifying Calibrator (Lethal).name: Calibrateur électrisant (mortel)
Electrifying Calibrator (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 17 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 5, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Electrifying calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 13 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Net (Champion).name: Filet (Champion)
Net (Champion).description:
Weapon (Net)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 18 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 15, 30 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

 

Net

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Thrown (range 15)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

Armor (Superior).name: Armure (supérieure)
Armor (Superior).description:
Armure (Toute)

Vous bénéficiez d'un bonus de +3 à la CA lorsque vous portez cette armure.

Electrifying Calibrator (Devastating).name: Calibrateur électrisant (dévastateur)
Electrifying Calibrator (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 18 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases to 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Electrifying calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 13 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Environmental Barrier Mk II.name: Barrière environnementale Mk II
Environmental Barrier Mk II.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 30 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, la créature takes any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Shield Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis de bouclier (avancé)
Shield Chassis (Advanced).description:
Bouclier (tous)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bouclier modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications d'armure, ainsi qu'un emplacement d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Panic Dart (Deadly).name: Fléchette de panique (mortel)
Panic Dart (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Panic dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Grenade, Plasma (Lethal).name: Grenade, Plasma (Métal)
Grenade, Plasma (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Grenade, plasma

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Rocket, Fragmentation (Major).name: Fusée, Fragmentation (Majeur)
Rocket, Fragmentation (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced rocket launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the rocket is fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 6d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

 

Rocket, fragmentation

This rocket launcher ammunition deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

Projector Tank, Cryo (Major).name: Réservoir de projecteur, cryo (majeur)
Projector Tank, Cryo (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 4d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Projector tank, cryo

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Mine, Cryo (Lethal).name: Le mien, Cryo (Métal)
Mine, Cryo (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, cryo

Projector Tank, Corrosive (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust.

 

Projector tank, corrosive

Focus Generator Chassis (Artifact).name: Châssis du générateur de focus (artefact)
Focus Generator Chassis (Artifact).description:
Focus (Force)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de générateur de mise au point modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du générateur de mise au point, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut héberger des modifications de rareté d'artefact ou inférieure.

Générateur de focalisation

Le générateur de focalisation est un objet portatif utilisé pour aider les lanceurs de force à apprendre à se concentrer sur leurs pouvoirs.

Grenade, Incendiary (Lethal).description:

As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 10d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Vous bénéficiez d'un bonus de +3 à la CA lorsque vous utilisez ce bouclier.

Electrifying Cartridge (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced electrifying cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the electrifying cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

 

Electrifying cartridge

An electrifying cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

Vitapac (Champion).name: Vitapac (Champion)
Vitapac (Champion).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

This fast-acting syringe grants a revitalizing boost. As an action, you can use this vitapac to restore expended Hit Dice to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature immediately regains nine Hit Dice. If la créature has spent Hit Dice of different sizes, determine which Hit Dice are restored randomly.

Giggledust (Pure).name: Poussière de rire (pure)
Giggledust (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This sandy-brown powder makes everything humorous while enhancing a creature's nimbleness. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Giggledust

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. Deuterium-pyro (Fine).name: Deutérium-pyro (Fin)
Deuterium-pyro (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This alcoholic beverage, favored amongst ruffians, features a terrible flavor and strong aftertaste. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Handwraps (Exceptional).name: Pansements (exceptionnels)
Handwraps (Exceptional).description:
Weapon (Unarmed Strike)

While wearing these handwraps, you have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts with your unarmed strikes.

Medpac (Improved).name: Medpac (amélioré)
Medpac (Improved).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls three dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie) If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Medpac

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

Computer Spike (Superior).name: Spike informatique (supérieur)
Computer Spike (Superior).description:
Consommable (Technologie)

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit du slicer), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe (aucune action requise) pour obtenir l'avantage sur le test, puis vous pouvez relancer l'un des dés une fois. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser la pointe, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Pique d'ordinateur

Lorsque vous effectuez un test d'Intelligence (kit de trancheur), vous pouvez utiliser la pointe. (aucune action requise) pour relancer le chèque. Vous devez utiliser le nouveau jet. Vous pouvez attendre d'avoir lancé le [[/r d20]] avant de décider d'utiliser le pic, mais vous devez décider avant que le MJ ne vous dise si le test réussit ou échoue.

Grenade Launcher (Fine).name: Lance-grenades (bien)
Grenade Launcher (Fine).description:
Weapon (Grenade Launcher)

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don't meet the grenade launcher's strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total. You have a +1 bonus to the sauvegarde DD and jet de dégâtss of grenades fired by this enhanced grenade launcher.

 

Grenade launcher

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Special (range 90/360)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don—t meet the grenade launcher—s strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade—s explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Mine, Incendiary (Lethal).name: Mine, incendiaire (mortel)
Mine, Incendiary (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine sets the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Spicebrew (Matured).name: Epicebrew (affiné)
Spicebrew (Matured).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Spicebrew, a popular drink across the galaxy, is a tanned alcoholic beverage topped with foam. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Electrifying Collimator (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 18 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases to 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Electrifying collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 13 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Wisdom score increases by 10, and its maximum for this score increases by 10. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Glitterstim (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

A silvery-green webbing sharp to the contact, yet when liquidized causes a heightened mental state and pleasurable boost. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 60 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Rocketpack (Improved).name: Rocketpack (amélioré)
Rocketpack (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 35 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 7 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an enhanced integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute. You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced rocket launcher.

 

Rocketpack

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 5 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute.

Projector Canister, Cryo (Average).name: Cartouche de projecteur, cryo (moyenne)
Projector Canister, Cryo (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, cryo

A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Yarrock (High Quality).name: Yarrock (haute qualité)
Yarrock (High Quality).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yarrock is a hallucinogen which is said to instill a creature with a clear vision of "the meaning of life", granting a boost to confidence. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.
