At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Goggles of the Tinkerer.name: Lunettes du bricoleur
Goggles of the Tinkerer.description:
Adventuring Gear (Head)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: at least 3 niveaus in engineer

This item can hold a number of charges equal to half your engineer niveau (rounded up). When you complete a repos long, this item regains all missing charges. Une fois par tour, quand vous utilisez a Potent Aptitude feature, you can spend 1 charge to roll the Potent Aptitude dice twice and add them together.

When you reach niveau 5 in engineer, you become a valid target of your Potent Aptitude feature. De plus, you gain 1 additional modification slot.

When you reach niveau 11 in engineer, you can add half your bonus de maîtrise, rounded down, to any test de caractéristique with tools you make that doesn't already include your bonus de maîtrise. De plus, you gain 1 additional modification slot (2).

When you reach niveau 17 in engineer, when use your action bonus to grant a Potent Aptitude die, you can grant a [[/r d4]] instead of expending a use of your Potent Aptitude. De plus, you gain 1 additional modification slot (3).

These goggles feature one-way glass lenses. When worn over the eyes, the lenses take whatever appearance the bearer decides.

Blueprint (Legendary).name: Plan (légendaire)
Blueprint (Legendary).description:
Adventuring Gear

Ce plan contient des informations concernant les matériaux bruts et rares, les outils et les étapes nécessaires pour fabriquer un objet de rareté légendaire. Pendant 1 heure, ce qui peut être fait lors d'un tribunal de repos, un personnage peut tenter d'apprendre le plan. S'ils le font, ils doivent réaliser un test d'Intelligence DD 26 avec les outils appropriés. En cas de réussite, le plan de l'objet est appris. En cas d'échec, le plan n'est pas appris et le personnage doit attendre 24 heures avant de pouvoir réessayer.

Les plans contiennent les secrets de la fabrication d'objets de nature plus complexe.

Constitution Stim (Exceptional).name: Constitution Stim (Exceptional)
Constitution Stim (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Constitution score increases by 8, and its maximum for this score increases by 8. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Binders (Improved).name: Classeurs (améliorés)
Binders (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 18 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. A set of binders comes with one key. Breaking the binders requires a DD 24 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 24 test de Dextérité. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 21 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 12 and 45 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

 

Binders

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 14 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. Breaking the binders requires a DD 20 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 20 test de Dextérité. A set of binders comes with one key. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 15 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 10 and 15 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

Holocron (Journeyman).name: Holocron (compagnon)
Holocron (Journeyman).description:
Adventuring Gear

This holocron contains a single 3rd-niveau pouvoir de la Force, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 2 with a combined niveau no greater than 3. After meditating with the holocron for at least 8 hours, a forcecaster with a Max Power Niveau of 3rd or higher can make a DD 18 forcecasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise based on the alignment of the power(s) stored within. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir de la Force(s), which does not count against their pouvoir de la Forces known and can not be unlearned except through use of a remove curse power. On a failure, the power is not learned and the forcecaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by Force-wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form.

 

Holocron

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by force wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form. They appear as palm-sized, glowing polyhedrons of crystalline material and hardware, and can only be activated and used through the power of the Force.

Rocket Boots (Fine).name: Bottes de fusée (Bien)
Rocket Boots (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear (Feet)

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 30 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cell.

 

Rocket boots

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Incendiary Cell (Major).name: Cellule incendiaire (majeure)
Incendiary Cell (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced incendiary cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the incendiary cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Incendiary cell

An incendiary cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals fire dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot it sets the ground beneath it in a case de 1,5 mètre ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Datacron Mk VI.name: Datacron Mk VI
Datacron Mk VI.description:
Adventuring Gear

This datacron contains a single 9th-niveau pouvoir technique, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 8 with a combined niveau no greater than 9. After tinkering with the datacron for at least 80 hours, a techcaster with a Max Power Niveau of 9th or higher can make a DD 30 techcasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir technique(s), which does not count against their pouvoir techniques known. On a failure, the power is not learned and the techcaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Datacrons are encrypted storage devices that contain an interactive projection, and are used to store high-value, sensitive information.

 

Datacron

A datacron is a type of holocron that can be accessed by non-Force-sensitives and are mainly used to store encrypted data. They are complete with an interactive projection to access the information.

Repair Kit Mk V.name: Kit de réparation Mk V
Repair Kit Mk V.description:
Consumable (Technology)

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls five dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Repair kit

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid or construct after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal

Electrifying Collimator (Major).name: Collimateur électrisant (majeur)
Electrifying Collimator (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 15 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 3, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Electrifying collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the shocking 13 property. If it already has the shocking property, its shocking number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Projector Canister, Incendiary (Average).name: Cartouche de projecteur, incendiaire (moyenne)
Projector Canister, Incendiary (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, incendiary

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Raava (Matured).name: Raava (affiné)
Raava (Matured).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Raava is a traditional liquor breed from zsajhira berries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Raava

Raava is a traditional liquor breed from zsajhira berries. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Mine, Plasma (Devastating).name: Mine, Plasma (Dévastateur)
Mine, Plasma (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Mine, plasma

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Lightweapon Chassis (Standard).name: Châssis d'arme légère (standard)
Lightweapon Chassis (Standard).description:
Arme (toute arme légère)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme légère modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes légères. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté standard.

Torpedo, Fragmentation (Devastating).name: Torpille, fragmentation (dévastatrice)
Torpedo, Fragmentation (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced torpedo launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 20d20]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the torpedo is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

Oscillation Calibrator (Devastating).name: Calibrateur d'oscillation (dévastateur)
Oscillation Calibrator (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Oscillation calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

Projector Tank, Cryo (Lethal).name: Réservoir de projecteur, Cryo (létal)
Projector Tank, Cryo (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 6d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Projector tank, cryo

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Flechette Mag, Fragmentation (Average).name: Fléchette Mag, Fragmentation (Moyenne)
Flechette Mag, Fragmentation (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Flechette mag, fragmentation

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Camtono (Fine).name: Camtono (Bien)
Camtono (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 18 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 6 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 11 et 30 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les marchandises stockées à l'intérieur.

Camtono

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 15 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 10 et 15 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les biens stockés à l'intérieur.

Poison (Major).name: Poison (majeur)
Poison (Major).description:
Consumable (Poison)

As an action, you can use the poison in this vial to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. A creature hit by the empoisonné weapon must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 6d4]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

 

Poison

As an action, you can use the poison in this vial to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. A creature hit by the empoisonné weapon must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d4]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

Portable Teleporter Mk III.name: Téléporteur portable Mk III
Portable Teleporter Mk III.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can use this teleporter to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 90 mètres away. These portals lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal.

Credit Chip (Improved).name: Puce de crédit (améliorée)
Credit Chip (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par vérification du kit de trancheuse DD 21.

Puce de crédit

La puce de crédit est une petite carte plate dotée d'un code de sécurité et de bandes de mémoire d'algorithme. La puce peut être préchargée avec un nombre spécifié de crédits, ou elle peut être tirée directement d'un compte spécifique détenu par l'utilisateur. La puce de crédit est accessible avec une épingle ou par le contrôle du kit d'une trancheuse DD 15.

Deafening Cell (Lethal).name: Cellule assourdissante (létale)
Deafening Cell (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced deafening cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the deafening cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals sonic dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] sonic dégâts and is assourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't assourdi.

 

Deafening cell

A deafening cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals sonic dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] sonic dégâts and is assourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't assourdi.

Machinist's Catalyzer Mk I.name: Catalyseur de machiniste Mk I
Machinist's Catalyzer Mk I.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can administer this catalyzer to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible gains a +1 bonus to its dégâts and healing rolls with pouvoir techniques. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one catalyzer at a time.

Grenade, Fragmentation (Lethal).name: Grenade, fragmentation (létale)
Grenade, Fragmentation (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Grenade, fragmentation

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Beemon Cardio-Regulator.name: Beemon Cardio-Régulateur
Beemon Cardio-Regulator.description:
Équipement d'aventure (cou)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Votre score de Constitution est de 19 pendant que vous portez ce tour de cou. Cela n'a aucun effet sur vous si votre Constitution est déjà de 19 ou plus.

La demande pour les implants des laboratoires Beemon s'étend même à ceux qui sont trop malades pour les utiliser sans l'aide d'un autre de leurs produits raffinés.

Mine, Electrifying (Lethal).name: Le mien, électrisant (mortel)
Mine, Electrifying (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, electrifying

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Flux Collimator (Lethal).name: Collimateur de flux (létal)
Flux Collimator (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack rolls and dealing an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Flux collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon.

Xerrol Nightstinger Rifle.name: Fusil Xerrol Nightstinger
Xerrol Nightstinger Rifle.description:
Weapon (Nightstinger Rifle)

You have a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss with this enhanced weapon. De plus, quand vous faites the Dexterity (Stealth) check to remain hidden as a part of the weapon's silent property, you have avantage on the check.

This nightstinger rifle has the unique property of shooting invisible rounds.

 

Nightstinger rifle

Power cell (range 125/500) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 2

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Silent

When you make a attaque d'arme à distance with a weapon with the silent property while hidden, it does not automatically reveal your presence. Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check contested by your targets' Wisdom (Perception) check. On a success, you remain hidden.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Intelligence Stim (Exceptional).name: Intelligence Stim (Exceptional)
Intelligence Stim (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Intelligence score increases by 8, and its maximum for this score increases by 8. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Flechette Clip, Ion (Deadly).name: Clip Fléchette, Ion (Mortel)
Flechette Clip, Ion (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Flechette clip, ion

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Cilona (High Quality).name: Cilona (haute qualité)
Cilona (High Quality).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Cilona, the active ingredient in deathsticks, is a hallucinogen that causes an ecstatic feeling that improves strength. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Cilona

Cilona, the active ingredient in deathsticks, is a hallucinogen that causes an ecstatic feeling that improves strength. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Tihaar (Special).name: Tihaar (Spécial)
Tihaar (Special).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This colorless spirit, favored by Mandalorians, burns the mouth and throat when consumed. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d12]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d12]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tihaar

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Missile, Incendiary (Average).name: Missile incendiaire (moyenne)
Missile, Incendiary (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Missile, incendiary

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Electrifying Dart (Lethal).name: Fléchette électrisante (létale)
Electrifying Dart (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Electrifying dart

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Battle Adrenal Mk II.name: Combattez Surrénalien Mk II
Battle Adrenal Mk II.description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, when la cible takes the Attack action, it can make two additional attacks (no action required). Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Ring of Master Force Storing.name: Anneau de stockage de force maître
Ring of Master Force Storing.description:
Adventuring Gear (Finger)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke le pouvoir de la Force lancé dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que l'harmonie soit accordée. le porteur les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 8 niveaux de pouvoir de la Forces à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d9]] - 1 niveaux de pouvoir de la Force stockés choisis par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer un pouvoir de la Force du 1er au niveau 8 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que le pouvoir de la Force est lancé. Le pouvoir de la Force n'a d'autre effet que d'être stocké dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir le pouvoir de la Force, le pouvoir de la Force est dépensé sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer le pouvoir de la Force détermine l'espace qu'il utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quel pouvoir de la Force qui y est stocké. Le pouvoir de la Force utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde de force, le bonus d'attaque de force et la capacité de lancement forcé du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traité comme si vous lanciez le pouvoir de la Force. Le pouvoir de la Force lancé depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stocké, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Spicebrew (Aged).name: Epicebrew (vieilli)
Spicebrew (Aged).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Spicebrew, a popular drink across the galaxy, is a tanned alcoholic beverage topped with foam. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d8]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d8]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Spicebrew

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Giggledust (High Quality).description:

This sandy-brown powder makes everything humorous while enhancing a creature's nimbleness. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Giggledust

Charge, Plasma (Average).name: Charge, Plasma (moyenne)
Charge, Plasma (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d6]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, plasma

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Wristpad (Superior).name: Bracelet (supérieur)
Wristpad (Superior).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +3 aux jets d'attaque technique pour les techniques de pouvoir que vous lancez via ce bracelet.

Wristpad

A le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Sorcerer's Adrenal (Superior).name: Surrénale du sorcier (supérieure)
Sorcerer's Adrenal (Superior).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible gains a +3 bonus to its force attack rolls, force sauvegarde DD, and dégâts and healing rolls with pouvoir de la Forces. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Camtono (Superior).name: Camtono (Supérieur)
Camtono (Superior).description:
Adventuring Gear

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 24 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 8 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube, a un AC de 13 et 60 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les marchandises stockées à l'intérieur.

Camtono

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 15 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 10 et 15 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les biens stockés à l'intérieur.

Torpedo, Fragmentation (Lethal).name: Torpille, Fragmentation (Mortelle)

Consumable (Ammunition)

Équipement d'aventure (épaules)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté premium ou inférieure.

Mummergy is a strong-smelling liquor derived from a plant of the same name. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d8]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d8]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Intelligence. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Vayerbok is a thick, green, vegetable-based alcoholic beverage typically served hot. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Wristpad Chassis (Advanced).name: Châssis du bracelet (avancé)
Wristpad Chassis (Advanced).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bracelet modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du poignet, ainsi qu'une augmentation fente. Il peut accueillir des modifications de rareté avancée ou inférieure.

Wristpad

A Le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Lightweapon Chassis (Legendary).name: Châssis d'arme légère (légendaire)
Lightweapon Chassis (Legendary).description:
Arme (toute arme légère)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'arme légère modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour modifications des armes légères, ainsi que deux emplacements d'augmentation. Il peut abriter des modifications d'une rareté légendaire ou inférieure.

Verpine Auto-Shielding Unit.name: Unité de protection automatique Verpine
Verpine Auto-Shielding Unit.description:
Bouclier (générateur de bouclier moyen)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Tout en portant ce générateur de bouclier, vous pouvez prononcer son mot de commande comme bonus d'action pour le faire animer. Le bouclier se projette dans les airs et plane dans votre espace pour vous protéger comme si vous le maniez, vous laissant les mains libres. Le bouclier reste animé pendant 1 minute, jusqu'à ce que vous utilisiez un bonus d'action pour mettre fin à cet effet, ou jusqu'à ce que vous soyez incapable d'agir ou mouriez, moment auquel le bouclier se désactive.

Machinist's Catalyzer Mk II.name: Catalyseur de machiniste Mk II
Machinist's Catalyzer Mk II.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can administer this catalyzer to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible gains a +1 bonus to its tech attack rolls, tech sauvegarde DD, and dégâts and healing rolls with pouvoir techniques. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one catalyzer at a time.

Torpedo, Fragmentation (Average).name: Torpille, fragmentation (moyenne)

Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced torpedo launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 20d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the torpedo is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

Constitution Stim (Improved).name: Constitution Stim (Improved)
Constitution Stim (Improved).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Constitution score increases by 4, and its maximum for this score increases by 4. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Mine, Cryo (Devastating).name: Le mien, Cryo (dévastateur)
Mine, Cryo (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Mine, cryo

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature gains 1 slowed niveau pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Grenade, Panic (Lethal).name: Grenade, panique (mortelle)
Grenade, Panic (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Yaladai (Uncut).name: Yaladai (non coupé)
Yaladai (Uncut).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Yaladai is a powerful stimulant that grants extreme clarity, improving relaxation and focus. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum point de Forces by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum point de Forces are reduced by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Mine, ion

Projector Tank, Incendiary (Devastating).name: Char de projection, incendiaire (dévastateur)
Projector Tank, Incendiary (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 7d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced cryo cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the cryo cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Cryo cell

The loaded weapon deals cold dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. Rocket, ion

This rocket launcher ammunition deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Corrosive Cartridge (Deadly).name: Cartouche corrosive (mortel)
Corrosive Cartridge (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced corrosive cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the corrosive cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Corrosive cartridge

A corrosive cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Dominator Belt.name: Ceinture de dominateur
Dominator Belt.description:
Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Lorsque vous portez cette ceinture, votre score de force devient 29. Si votre force est déjà égal ou supérieur à 29, il n'a aucun effet sur vous.

Bien qu'il adhère à peine à la définition la plus technique d'une ceinture, cet ensemble d'actionneurs pneumatiques en forme de harnais fournit une force énorme à chaque membre du corps de son porteur, augmentant monstrueusement sa puissance physique.

Power Cell (Devastating).name: Cellule de puissance (dévastatrice)
Power Cell (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls and deal an additional [[/r 1d10]] dégâts with this enhanced power cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Power cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Torpedo Launcher (Fine).name: Lance-torpilles (bien)
Torpedo Launcher (Fine).description:
Weapon (Torpedo Launcher)

You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced weapon. De plus, the dégâts of torpedoes fired by this weapon increases by one step (from [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]], [[/r d8]] to [[/r d10]], [[/r d10]] to [[/r d12]], or [[/r d12]] to [[/r d20]]). If this would increase the dégâts die above a [[/r d20]], instead add an additional five dice to the torpedo's dégâts for each step above a [[/r d20]].

 

Torpedo launcher

Special (range 1200/3600)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the torpedo launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of torpedoes. Torpedo launchers have avantage on attack rolls against Gargantuan creatures and disavantage on attack rolls against Large and smaller creatures. Unlike other weapons, the torpedo launcher can only be loaded using an action, and you don't add your Dexterity modificateur to jet de dégâtss you make with it.

The torpedo launcher requires the use of a tripod, which is included in the price. Over the course of 1 minute, you can deploy or collapse the torpedo launcher on the tripod. While deployed, your speed is reduced to 0.

Grenade, Deafening (Deadly).name: Grenade assourdissante (mortel)
Grenade, Deafening (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, deafening

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Repair Kit Mk VI.name: Kit de réparation Mk VI
Repair Kit Mk VI.description:
Consumable (Technology)

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls six dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Repair kit

A repair kit included the basic tools needed to repair a droid or construct after being dégâtsd in combat. The kit has three uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to restore points de vie to a droid or construct within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal

Rocket, Fragmentation (Deadly).name: Fusée, fragmentation (mortel)
Rocket, Fragmentation (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced rocket launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the rocket is fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 8d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

 

Rocket, fragmentation

This rocket launcher ammunition deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

Deafening Collimator (Average).name: Collimateur assourdissant (moyen)
Deafening Collimator (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 14 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 2, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Deafening collimator

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 13 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Shield (Improved).name: Bouclier (amélioré)
Shield (Improved).description:
Bouclier (Tous)

Vous bénéficiez d'un bonus de +2 à la CA lorsque vous utilisez ce bouclier.

Binders (Champion).name: Classeurs (Champion)
Binders (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 24 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. A set of binders comes with one key. Breaking the binders requires a DD 30 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 30 test de Dextérité. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 30 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 15 and 90 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

 

Binders

Binders can be used to restrain a Small or Medium creature with appropriate appendages. Applying binders takes an action, and la cible must make a DD 14 Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the ability to use). A hostile creature makes this sauvegarde with avantage. Breaking the binders requires a DD 20 test de Force. Escaping them requires a DD 20 test de Dextérité. A set of binders comes with one key. Without the key, unlocking the binders requires a DD 15 security kit to force open. Binders have an AC of 10 and 15 points de vie. Destroying the binders frees la créature without harming it.

Tool (Basic).name: Outil (de base)
Tool (Basic).description:
Adventuring Gear

Your level of maîtrise in these tools increases by one step (to trained, from trained to proficient, from proficient to expertise, from expertise to mastery, from mastery to high mastery, or from high mastery to grand mastery).

Missile, Incendiary (Devastating).name: Missile incendiaire (dévastateur)
Missile, Incendiary (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 3d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 6d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

 

Missile, incendiary

This wrist launcher ammunition deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes, setting the ground beneath it in a 15 foot radius ablaze pendant 1 minute. When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. A construct makes this sauvegarde with disavantage.

Strength Stim (Exceptional).name: Strength Stim (Exceptional)
Strength Stim (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Strength score increases by 8, and its maximum for this score increases by 8. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Deafening Cell (Major).name: Cellule assourdissante (majeure)
Deafening Cell (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced deafening cell. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the deafening cell is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, the loaded weapon deals sonic dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] sonic dégâts and is assourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't assourdi.

 

Deafening cell

A deafening cell is a specialized power cell for use with blaster weapons that deal acid, energy, fire, ion, or sonic dégâts. The loaded weapon deals sonic dégâts instead of its normal type de dégâts, and quand vous contactez with a shot la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] sonic dégâts and is assourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't assourdi.

Rocketpack (Fine).name: Rocketpack (Bien)
Rocketpack (Fine).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 30 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 6 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an enhanced integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute. You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced rocket launcher.

 

Rocketpack

Rocketpacks combine the aerial transportation of a jetpack with the firepower of a rocket launcher. Activating or deactivating the rocketpack's flight capabilities requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 5 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Rather than traditional power cells, this rocket launcher fires specialized projectiles in the form of rockets. Whenever you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead fire this rocket launcher. When firing a rocket at long range, creatures within the radius of the rocket's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Reloading this rocket launcher takes 1 minute.

Camtono (Improved).name: Camtono (amélioré)
Camtono (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 21 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 7 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 12 et 45 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les marchandises stockées à l'intérieur.

Camtono

A camtono est un conteneur sécurisé à poignée utilisé pour le transport de marchandises de valeur. Un camtono est livré avec une clé. Sans la clé, le déverrouillage du camtono nécessite un kit de sécurité DD 15 pour forcer l'ouverture. Il stocke 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 de pied cube, a un AC de 10 et 15 points de vie. Détruire le camtono risque d'endommager les biens stockés à l'intérieur.

Projector Tank, Incendiary (Deadly).name: Char de projection, incendiaire (mortel)
Projector Tank, Incendiary (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 5d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

 

Projector tank, incendiary

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a burst of flame in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Projector Tank, Cryo (Deadly).name: Réservoir de projecteur, Cryo (mortel)
Projector Tank, Cryo (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 5d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Projector tank, cryo

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Flechette Mag, Ion (Average).name: Fléchette Mag, Ion (Moyenne)
Flechette Mag, Ion (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Flechette mag, ion

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of ion flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Bolas (Exceptional).name: Bolas (Exceptionnel)
Bolas (Exceptional).description:
Weapon (Bolas)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 17 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 14, 25 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

 

Bolas

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 20/60)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Stamina Adrenal (Superior).name: Endurance surrénalienne (supérieure)
Stamina Adrenal (Superior).description:
Consumable (Adrenal)

As an action, you can administer this adrenal to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this adrenal, la cible's current and maximum points de vie increase by 40. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. A creature can benefit from only one adrenal at a time.

Jedi Master's Robe.name: Robe de Maître Jedi
Jedi Master's Robe.description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +3 à la CA pendant que vous portez ce vêtement. robe.

Les membres de l'Ordre portent généralement des vêtements simples ou sans prétention, mais les Maîtres Jedi connaissent également l'importance d'une protection adéquate lorsque de grands défis doivent être surmontés.

Muon Gold (Uncut).name: Muon Or (non coupé)
Muon Gold (Uncut).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Muon gold is a lubricant-based spice that gives users intensified mental clarity and focus for a short time. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Muon gold

Muon gold is a lubricant-based spice that gives users intensified mental clarity and focus for a short time. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Deafening Collimator (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this collimator to one lightweapon within 5 mètres, granting it a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 15 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 3, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Deafening collimator
