This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 13 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Armor (Fine).name: Armure (Bien)
Armor (Fine).description:
Armure (Toute)

Vous bénéficiez d'un bonus de +1 à la CA lorsque vous portez cette armure.

Flashy.name: Flashy
Flashy.description:
Weapon (Heavy Pistol)

The first time you hit a creature with a attaque d'arme à distance from this weapon each round, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] dégâts from the attack.

Flashy is an SSK heavy pistol owned by the mercenary Corso Riggs during the Galactic Cold War.

 

Heavy pistol

Power cell (range 45/180) Cell

Weapons with this property are fueled by power cells, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon. A power cell fuels a number of attacks equal to the weapon's reload number.

Reload 16

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Environmental Barrier Mk I.name: Barrière environnementale Mk I
Environmental Barrier Mk I.description:
Consumable (Barrier)

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 15 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, la créature takes any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Armor Chassis (Premium).name: Châssis blindé (Premium)
Armor Chassis (Premium).description:
Armure (Tout)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis d'armure modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications d'armure. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté premium ou inférieure.

Mine, Plasma (Lethal).name: Mine, Plasma (Métal)
Mine, Plasma (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 10d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Mine, plasma

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. Mine, Stun (Deadly).name: Le mien, étourdissant (mortel)
Mine, Stun (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Missile, Ion (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the missile then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 5 mètres must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 4d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. Thermal Detonator (Average).name: Détonateur thermique (moyenne)
Thermal Detonator (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Thermal detonators are unique in that can only be turned off by whoever turned them on. They can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 20 mètres must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] fire and [[/r 4d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is knocked à terre.

Deafening Calibrator (Major).name: Calibrateur assourdissant (majeur)
Deafening Calibrator (Major).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 15 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 3, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Deafening calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 13 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Muon Gold (Potent).name: Muon Ou (Puissant)
Muon Gold (Potent).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Muon gold is a lubricant-based spice that gives users intensified mental clarity and focus for a short time. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d10]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d10]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Muon gold

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Grenade Launcher (Superior).name: Lance-grenades (supérieur)
Grenade Launcher (Superior).description:
Weapon (Grenade Launcher)

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don't meet the grenade launcher's strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total. You have a +3 bonus to the sauvegarde DD and jet de dégâtss of grenades fired by this enhanced grenade launcher.

 

Grenade launcher

Reload 1

A number of shots equal to the reload number can be made with a weapon with this property. A character must then reload it using an action or a action bonus (their choice). You must have one free hand to reload.

Special (range 90/360)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Strength 11

A weapon with this property has a heavy kickback. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Strength requirement. If the weapon has the burst, penetrating, or rapid property, you must meet the Strength requirement to use this feature. If the weapon lacks the two-handed property, you can wield the weapon in two hands to temporarily reduce the strength number by one step (from 19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If this would reduce the strength number below 11, you ignore it entirely.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Description

Rather than traditional power cells, the grenade launcher fires grenades. When firing a grenade at long range, or if you don—t meet the grenade launcher—s strength requirement, creatures within the radius of the grenade—s explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the grenade launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Grenade, Gas (Major).name: Grenade à gaz (majeure)
Grenade, Gas (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, filling the air in a 10-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 6d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

Matrix Armor.description:
Armure (toute lourde)

Lorsque vous portez cette armure, tout coup critique contre vous devient un coup normal.

Cette armure a vu ses composants de protection en acier dur remplacés par des équivalents en matrice, un métal violet utilisé pour renforcer vaisseaux spatiaux.

Jetpack (Exceptional).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Jetpacks are personal aerial transportation devices that allow the operator to fly into and through the air with great mobility. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 70 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 18 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

De plus, your rocketpack comes with an enhanced integrated rocket launcher with the Ammunition (range 100/400) and reload 1 properties. Wrist-Mounted Grappling Hook.name: Grappin monté sur poignet
Wrist-Mounted Grappling Hook.description:
Adventuring Gear (Forearm)

You craft a wrist-mounted grappling hook weapon attached to a tightly coiled cord. With this grappler, you can make a attaque d'arme à distance with a range of 30/60. En cas de contacter, it deals [[/r 1d4]] kinetic dégâts. This attack can target a surface, object, or creature.

A creature struck by this attack is impaled by the hook. As an action, a creature can attempt to remove the hook. Removing the hook requires a DD 13 test de Force. While the hook is stuck in la cible, you are connected to la cible by a 60 foot cable.

While the hook is deployed, you can use your action bonus to activate the reel, pulling yourpersonnelle to the location if la cible is your size or larger. A creature or object smaller than you is pulled to you. Alternatively, you can opt to release the cable (no action required).

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you recover and reinsert the hook as an action.

Reactive Ultrachrome Armor.name: Armure réactive ultrachrome
Reactive Ultrachrome Armor.description:
Armor (Heavy Exoskeleton)

Requires attunement

You have resistence to unenhanced dégâts while you wear this armor. De plus, you can use an action to make yourpersonnelle immune to unenhanced dégâts for 10 minutes or until you are no longer wearing the armor. Once this special action is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Made with just enough ultrachrome to give you an edge while still keeping things interesting, these suits of armor can discharge an integrated power cell to catalyze this metal normally used in starship hulls into a more resilient state.

 

Heavy exoskeleton

Bulky

While wearing armor with this property, you have disavantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks that rely on sound.

Strength 17

While wearing armor or wielding a shield with this property, your speed is reduced by 10 unless your Strength score meets or exceeds the strength number.

Heavy exoskeletons are virtually the heaviest armor acquirable during the Galactic War. It is ideal for extreme combat situations that involved direct dégâts and also offers a very good niveau of protection in sacrifice of dexterity. Some consider it claustrophobic but that was the trade-off for safety.

Corrosive Cartridge (Lethal).name: Cartouche corrosive (létale)
Corrosive Cartridge (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced corrosive cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the corrosive cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d10]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

 

Corrosive cartridge

A corrosive cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] acid dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with the loaded weapon, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything unenhanced it is wearing or carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. A creature destroyed in this way can not be revitalized.

Ring of Apprentice Force Storing.name: Anneau de stockage de force de l'apprenti
Ring of Apprentice Force Storing.description:
Adventuring Gear (Finger)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke le pouvoir de la Force lancé dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que l'harmonie soit accordée. le porteur les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 3 niveaux de pouvoir de la Forces à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d4]] - 1 niveaux de pouvoir de la Force stockés choisis par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer un pouvoir de la Force du 1er au niveau 3 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que le pouvoir de la Force est lancé. Le pouvoir de la Force n'a d'autre effet que d'être stocké dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir le pouvoir de la Force, le pouvoir de la Force est dépensé sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer le pouvoir de la Force détermine l'espace qu'il utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quel pouvoir de la Force qui y est stocké. Le pouvoir de la Force utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde de force, le bonus d'attaque de force et la capacité de lancement forcé du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traité comme si vous lanciez le pouvoir de la Force. Le pouvoir de la Force lancé depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stocké, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

Slug Cartridge (Deadly).name: Cartouche anti-limaces (mortel)
Slug Cartridge (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced slug cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the slug cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus.

 

Slug cartridge

Weapons with this property fire slug cartridges, which must be loaded in order to fire the weapon.

Cilona (Pure).name: Cilona (Pure)
Cilona (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Cilona, the active ingredient in deathsticks, is a hallucinogen that causes an ecstatic feeling that improves strength. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d12]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d12]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Cilona

Cilona, the active ingredient in deathsticks, is a hallucinogen that causes an ecstatic feeling that improves strength. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Mine, Stun (Devastating).name: Le mien, étourdissant (dévastateur)
Mine, Stun (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature is étourdi until the end of their next turn.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Constitution Stim (Champion).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Constitution score increases by 10, and its maximum for this score increases by 10. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Muon Gold (Pure).name: Ou muon (pur)
Muon Gold (Pure).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Muon gold is a lubricant-based spice that gives users intensified mental clarity and focus for a short time. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d12]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 8 hours, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d12]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Muon gold

At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Giggledust (Fine).description:

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Mine, Gas (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, the mine fills the air in a 15-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 8d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is inconscient pendant 1 minute, until it takes dégâts, or until someone uses an action to shake or slap la créature awake. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 9 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d10]] - 1 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir stockées choisies par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer une technique de pouvoir du 1er au niveau 9 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que la technique du pouvoir est lancée. La technique du pouvoir n'a aucun effet, si ce n'est d'être stockée dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir la technique du pouvoir, la technique du pouvoir est dépensée sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer la technique de pouvoir détermine l'espace qu'elle utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quelle technique de pouvoir qui y est stockée. Équipement d'aventure (taille)

Cette ceinture augmente la puissance physique de l'utilisateur grâce à des solives d'assistance pneumatiques qui fournissent soutien et effet de levier dans un format minimal.

Flechette Clip, Plasma (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette clip holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Nécessite une harmonisation

Votre score de force est de 19 pendant que vous portez ces gantelets. Ils n'ont aucun effet sur vous si votre Force est déjà de 19 ou plus.

Grenade, ion

As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius are disabled until rebooted.

Projector Canister, Cryo (Deadly).name: Cartouche de projecteur, Cryo (mortel)
Projector Canister, Cryo (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 20 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 4d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, cryo

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Deafening Calibrator (Deadly).name: Calibrateur assourdissant (mortel)
Deafening Calibrator (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 16 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 4, to a maximum of 18. Lastly, if the weapon is not enhanced, it becomes enhanced for the duration.

 

Deafening calibrator

As an action, you can apply this calibrator to one vibroweapon or pair of handwraps within 5 mètres, granting it a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss pendant 1 minute. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, for the duration, the weapon gains the sonorous 13 property. If it already has the sonorous property, its sonorous number increases by 1, to a maximum of 18.

Handwraps (Improved).name: Bandages (améliorés)
Handwraps (Improved).description:
Weapon (Unarmed Strike)

While wearing these handwraps, you have a +2 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with your unarmed strikes.

Pants Chassis (Legendary).name: Châssis de pantalon (légendaire)
Pants Chassis (Legendary).description:
Équipement d'aventure (jambes)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements, ainsi que deux augmentations. créneaux. Il peut abriter des modifications d'une rareté légendaire ou inférieure.

Novanian Grog (Matured).name: Grog Novanian (affiné)
Novanian Grog (Matured).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This grog features a pungent odor and a strong kick. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d6]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Novanian grog

This grog features a pungent odor and a strong kick. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that increases their current and maximum tech points by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, their current and maximum tech points are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Wisdom Stim (Basic).name: Wisdom Stim (Basic)
Wisdom Stim (Basic).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Wisdom score increases by 2, to a maximum of 20. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Holocron (Adept).name: Holocron (Adepte)
Holocron (Adept).description:
Adventuring Gear

This holocron contains a single 5th-niveau pouvoir de la Force, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 4 with a combined niveau no greater than 5. After meditating with the holocron for at least 16 hours, a forcecaster with a Max Power Niveau of 5th or higher can make a DD 22 forcecasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise based on the alignment of the power(s) stored within. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir de la Force(s), which does not count against their pouvoir de la Forces known and can not be unlearned except through use of a remove curse power. On a failure, the power is not learned and the forcecaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by Force-wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form.

 

Holocron

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by force wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form. They appear as palm-sized, glowing polyhedrons of crystalline material and hardware, and can only be activated and used through the power of the Force.

Grenade, Panic (Deadly).name: Grenade, panique (mortel)
Grenade, Panic (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 20 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 8d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, panic

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). Armor (Exceptional).description:
Armor (Any)

You have a +3 bonus to AC while wearing this armor. De plus, while wearing this armor, dégâts you take is reduced by 1. If this would reduce the dégâts to 0, the dégâts is instead reduced to 1.

Net (Superior).name: Net (Supérieur)
Net (Superior).description:
Weapon (Net)

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 16 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 13, 20 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

 

Net

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Thrown (range 15)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is entravé until it is freed. A net has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Force, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The net has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the net frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the net's effects. While a creature is entravé by a net, you can make no further attacks with it.

Flechette Mag, Fragmentation (Deadly).name: Fléchette Mag, Fragmentation (Mortel)
Flechette Mag, Fragmentation (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of kinetic flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 5d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced electrifying cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the electrifying cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 22 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

 

Electrifying cartridge

An electrifying cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't shocked.

Inquisitor Saber.name: Sabre d'inquisiteur
Inquisitor Saber.description:
Weapon (Any Lightweapon)

Requires attunement

Prerequisite: Double property

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced weapon.

As a action bonus, you cause the lightsaber to rapidly spin. When you do so, you lose the +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with the weapon, but you gain a +1 bonus to AC. De plus, while spinning, you have a 30-foot flying speed. While flying, if you take dégâts, you must make a concentration check as if concentrating on a power. On a failure, you immediately fall to the ground.

These lightweapons, favored by the Jedi hunters known as Inquisitors, have the unique ability to rapidly spin, granting its wielder a limited flying ability.

Projector Tank, Incendiary (Average).name: Réservoir de projecteur, incendiaire (moyen)
Projector Tank, Incendiary (Average).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 16 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 3d8]] fire dégâts or half as much on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

Mines can be set to detonate when a creature comes within up to 15 mètres of it or paired with a remote detonator. As an action, you can prime and set a mine on a surface you can reach, which arms at the start of your next turn. When detonated, chaque créature within 15 mètres of it must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Remote Detonator (Improved).name: Détonateur à distance (amélioré)
Remote Detonator (Improved).description:
Adventuring Gear

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to six mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 90 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

 

Remote detonator

A small handhold device with a single button, used to activate explosives. Over the course of 1 minute, you can pair the detonator with up to two mines within 10 mètres. As an action, you can remotely detonate all of the paired mines. You must be within 30 mètres of the mines to detonate them.

Poison (Average).name: Poison (moyen)
Poison (Average).description:
Consumable (Poison)

As an action, you can use the poison in this vial to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Portable Teleporter Mk II.name: Téléporteur portable Mk II
Portable Teleporter Mk II.description:
Consumable (Technology)

As an action, you can use this teleporter to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 60 mètres away. These portals lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal.

Grenade, Panic (Devastating).name: Grenade, panique (dévastatrice)
Grenade, Panic (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 24 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 12d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, panic

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] psychic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the start of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Gas Cartridge (Devastating).name: Cartouche de gaz (dévastatrice)
Gas Cartridge (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced gas cartridge. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the gas cartridge has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. De plus, quand vous contactez with a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d10]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

 

Gas cartridge

A gas cartridge is a specialized slug cartridge for use with blaster weapons that deal kinetic dégâts. Quand vous contactez avec a shot with the loaded weapon, la créature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d6]] poison dégâts and is empoisonné until the start of its next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't empoisonné.

Weapon (Fine).name: Armé (Bien)
Weapon (Fine).description:
Weapon (Any)

You have a +1 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced weapon.

Torpedo, Plasma (Devastating).name: Torpille, Plasma (Dévastateur)
Torpedo, Plasma (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this enhanced torpedo launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 20d20]] energy dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the power generator is depleted, it no longer gives a bonus.

Grenade, Incendiary (Devastating).name: Grenade incendiaire (dévastatrice)
Grenade, Incendiary (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 12d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

 

Grenade, incendiary

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, setting the ground in a rayon de 3 mètres ablaze pendant 1 minute. The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

When a creature enters the fire or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

Datacron Mk V.name: Datacron Mk V
Datacron Mk V.description:
Adventuring Gear

This datacron contains a single 7th-niveau pouvoir technique, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 6 with a combined niveau no greater than 7. After tinkering with the datacron for at least 40 hours, a techcaster with a Max Power Niveau of 7th or higher can make a DD 26 techcasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir technique(s), which does not count against their pouvoir techniques known. On a failure, the power is not learned and the techcaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Datacrons are encrypted storage devices that contain an interactive projection, and are used to store high-value, sensitive information.

 

Datacron

A datacron is a type of holocron that can be accessed by non-Force-sensitives and are mainly used to store encrypted data. They are complete with an interactive projection to access the information.

Flechette Mag, Plasma (Devastating).name: Fléchette Mag, Plasma (Dévastateur)
Flechette Mag, Plasma (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 24 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 7d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

 

Flechette mag, plasma

When triggered, this flechette cannon ammunition fires a volley of energy flechette rounds in a short line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a long line 45 mètres long and 5 mètres wide. A single flechette mag holds enough ammunition for three attacks in a short line or one attack in a long line. Each creature must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

Strength Stim (Improved).name: Strength Stim (Improved)
Strength Stim (Improved).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Strength score increases by 4, and its maximum for this score increases by 4. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Grenade, Gas (Average).name: Grenade, gaz (moyenne)
Grenade, Gas (Average).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, filling the air in a 10-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 4d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

 

Grenade, gas

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. The grenade explodes, filling the air in a 10-foot-radius sphere with yellow-green fog pendant 1 minute. The fog spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until a wind of at least 10 miles per hour disperses it.

When a creature enters the fog or starts its turn there, it creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. The creature takes [[/r 2d6]] poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, la créature is empoisonné while it is in the cloud. Droids, constructs and humanoids wearing appropriate protective equipment are unaffected.

Necklace of Determination.name: Collier de détermination
Necklace of Determination.description:
Équipement d'aventure (cou)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Prérequis : au moins 3 niveaux en moine

Cet objet peut contenir un nombre de charges égal à la moitié de votre niveau de moine (arrondi au supérieur). Lorsque vous effectuez une mise en pension longue, cet objet récupère tous les frais manquants. Lorsque vous souhaitez dépenser un point de focus, vous pouvez à la place dépenser une charge.

Lorsque vous atteignez le niveau 5 en moine, lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction Chute lente, le montant est augmenté à dix fois votre niveau de moine, au lieu de cinq.

Lorsque vous atteignez le niveau 11 en moine, lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction Deflect Missiles, vous pouvez ajouter votre Sagesse ou Modificateur de Charisme au jet (au choix, un minimum de +1).

Lorsque vous atteignez le niveau 17 en moine, vous pouvez ajouter la moitié de votre modificateur de Dextérité (arrondi à l'inférieur) à votre modificateur de sauvegarde de focus et d'attaque de focus.

Ce collier simple composé d'une série de petites perles grises abrite un seul cristal bleu pâle. qui brille faiblement.

Projector Canister, Corrosive (Devastati.name: Cartouche de projecteur, corrosive (dévastatrice)
Projector Canister, Corrosive (Devastati.description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 6d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, corrosive

When triggered, this wrist launcher ammunition produces a spray of acid in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you have disavantage on jet de dégâtss with it

Smugglepack (Champion).name: Contrebande (Champion)
Smugglepack (Champion).description:
Adventuring Gear (Back)

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal pouvant stocker 10 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 10 lb, ne dépassant pas 3/8 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 30.

Smugglepack

Ce sac à dos est livré avec un compartiment principal qui stocke 15,00 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/2 pied cube. De plus, il possède un compartiment de rangement caché pouvant stocker 5 lb, ne dépassant pas 1/4 pied cube. Trouver le compartiment caché nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 15.

Shield (Champion).name: Bouclier (Champion)
Shield (Champion).description:
Shield (Any)

You have a +3 bonus to AC while wielding this shield. De plus, while wielding this shield, dégâts you take is reduced by 2. If this would reduce the dégâts to 0, the dégâts is instead reduced to 1.

Tihaar (Reserve).name: Tihaar (Réserve)
Tihaar (Reserve).description:
Consumable (Substance)

This colorless spirit, favored by Mandalorians, burns the mouth and throat when consumed. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d10]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d10]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d10]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d10]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tihaar

This colorless spirit, favored by Mandalorians, burns the mouth and throat when consumed. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and at the start of each of la créature's turns it gains [[/r 2d3]] points de vie temporaires. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde using Constitution, and for the duration their current and maximum points de vie are reduced by [[/r 2d3]]. If this would reduce your maximum points de vie below 1, it instead becomes 1. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Jensaarai Cloak.name: Cap Jensaarai
Jensaarai Cloak.description:
Adventuring Gear (Shoulders)

Requires attunement

While wearing this cloak with its hood up, you can try to hide when you are lightly obscured from la créature from which you are hiding. Pulling the hood up or down requires a action bonus.

Jensaarai Regalia. While wearing and attuned to this cloak and Jensaarai Armor, while its hood is up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see you have disavantage, and you have avantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide. While wearing and attuned to this cloak, Jensaraai Armor, and Jensaarai Headgear, quand vous faites a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to an avoid an effect that would deal cold, energy, fire, force, or kinetic dégâts, you can add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) to the roll if it doesn't already include that modificateur.

Most Jensaari wear a gray cloak that subtly adapts to their surroundings.

Grenade, Ion (Major).name: Grenade, Ion (Majeure)
Grenade, Ion (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

 

Grenade, ion

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius are disabled until rebooted.

Wristpad Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis du bracelet (prototype)
Wristpad Chassis (Prototype).description:
Focus (Tech)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de bracelet modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du poignet, ainsi qu'une augmentation fente. Il peut accueillir des modifications de rareté du prototype ou inférieure.

Wristpad

A Le bracelet est un harnais avec un datapad intégré et une interface holoprojecteur qui s'adapte à l'avant-bras et comprend des batteries de chargement personnel.

Atmospheric Decanting Vessel.name: Récipient de décantation atmosphérique
Atmospheric Decanting Vessel.description:
Adventuring Gear

Cette cruche en métal semble pouvoir contenir un gallon de liquide et pèse 12 livres, qu'elle soit pleine ou vide.

Vous pouvez utiliser une action et nommer un liquide dans le tableau ci-dessous pour que la cruche produise le liquide choisi. Ensuite, vous pouvez ouvrir la carafe par action et verser ce liquide, jusqu'à 2 gallons par minute. La quantité maximale de liquide que la carafe peut produire dépend du liquide que vous avez nommé.

Une fois que la carafe commence à produire un liquide, elle ne peut pas en produire un autre, ou plusieurs d'entre eux ayant atteint son maximum, jusqu'à l'aube suivante.

| Liquide | Quantité |

|:----:|:-------------|

| Acide | 8 onces |

| Alcool fort | 1 gallon |

| Alcool faible | 4 gallons |

| Poison de base | 1/2 once |

| Liquide | Quantité |

|:---:|:------------|

| Condiments | 2 gallons |

| Lubrifiant | 1 litre |

| Eau potable | 8 gallons |

| Eau stagnante | 12 gallons |

La plupart des liquides que l'on pourrait désirer ne comportent curieusement qu'une poignée d'éléments. Cet appareil en récupère un réservoir pour recréer une sélection de ces liquides à la demande.

Vayerbok (Fine).name: Vayerbok (Bien)
Vayerbok (Fine).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Vayerbok is a thick, green, vegetable-based alcoholic beverage typically served hot. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d4]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 16 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d4]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 16 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Vayerbok

Vayerbok is a thick, green, vegetable-based alcoholic beverage typically served hot. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Wisdom. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Jedi Knight's Robe.name: Robe de chevalier Jedi
Jedi Knight's Robe.description:
Équipement d'aventure (corps)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Vous gagnez un bonus de +2 à la CA pendant que vous portez ce vêtement. robe.

Les membres de l'Ordre portent généralement des vêtements simples ou sans prétention, mais cette variante offre la protection supplémentaire nécessaire aux Jedi influençant des événements importants.

Projector Canister, Cryo (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced wrist launcher ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 6d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

 

Projector canister, cryo

A single fuel canister holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour. If you lack maîtrise in the wrist launcher, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Rocket Boots (Superior).name: Bottes de fusée (supérieure)
Rocket Boots (Superior).description:
Adventuring Gear (Feet)

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 40 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cell.

 

Rocket boots

Rocket boots are a form of rocket propulsion system affixed to a pair of boots instead of being worn on the back like a standard jetpack. Activating or deactivating the boots requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 25 mètres. The rocket boots last pendant 1 minute and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Intelligence Stim (Improved).name: Intelligence Stim (Improved)
Intelligence Stim (Improved).description:
Consumable (Stimpac)

As an action, you can administer this stimpac to a creature within 5 mètres. When you administer this stimpac, la cible's Intelligence score increases by 4, and its maximum for this score increases by 4. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour. A creature can benefit from only one stimpac at a time.

Tunic Chassis (Prototype).name: Châssis Tunique (Prototype)
Tunic Chassis (Prototype).description:
Adventuring Gear (Body)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de vêtements modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications de vêtements, ainsi qu'une augmentation fente. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté de prototype ou inférieure.

Charge, Plasma (Major).name: Charge, Plasma (Majeur)
Charge, Plasma (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d8]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, plasma

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Charge, Plasma (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Each creature within the cone must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d10]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

 

Charge, plasma

A device used to blow holes in larger constructs and structures, a breaching charge creates a devastating explosion focused in a specific direction. Installing a breaching charge takes 1 minute. The charge can be set with a 6-second timer, or detonated remotely using a remote detonator.

When detonated, the breaching charge explodes in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a DD 14 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 20d4]] energy dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. If affixed to a creature, cette créature has disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. Objects, structures, and other surfaces have disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If affixed to the object, structure, or surface, it instead automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde.

Rocket, Ion (Deadly).name: Fusée, Ion (mortel)
Rocket, Ion (Deadly).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this enhanced rocket launcher ammunition, which deals [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. De plus, hit or miss, the rocket then explodes. La cible and chaque créature within 15 mètres must make a DD 20 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 8d6]] ion dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Any electronics within the blast radius that aren't being worn or carried are disabled until rebooted.

As an action, you can administer this barrier to a creature within 5 mètres. The barrier has 50 points de vie, and lasts 8 hours. Whenever la créature takes dégâts (one of energy, ion, or kinetic, chosen by the GM when the item is created), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts. A creature can benefit from only one barrier at a time.

Grenade, Electrifying (Major).name: Grenade, électrifiante (majeure)
Grenade, Electrifying (Major).description:
Consumable (Explosive)

Grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw a grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 10 mètres must make a DD 18 Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 6d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is shocked pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Grenade, electrifying

This sandy-brown powder makes everything humorous while enhancing a creature's nimbleness. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next hour, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d10]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 22 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 4 hours, during which they must roll a [[/r d10]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Dexterity. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Ring of Tech Storing Mk II.name: Anneau de stockage technologique Mk II
Ring of Tech Storing Mk II.description:
Adventuring Gear (Doigt)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Cet anneau stocke les techniques de pouvoir lancées dedans, les maintenant jusqu'à ce que le porteur soit à l'écoute. les utilise. L'anneau peut stocker jusqu'à 3 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir à la fois. Une fois trouvé, il contient [[/r 1d4]] - 1 niveaux de techniques de pouvoir stockées choisies par le GM.

Toute créature peut lancer une technique de pouvoir du 1er au niveau 3 dans l'anneau en contactant l'anneau pendant que la technique du pouvoir est lancée. La technique du pouvoir n'a aucun effet, si ce n'est d'être stockée dans le ring. Si l'anneau ne peut pas contenir la technique du pouvoir, la technique du pouvoir est dépensée sans effet. Le niveau de l'emplacement utilisé pour lancer la technique de pouvoir détermine l'espace qu'elle utilise.

En portant cet anneau, vous pouvez lancer n'importe quelle technique de pouvoir qui y est stockée. La technique du pouvoir utilise le niveau d'emplacement, le DD de sauvegarde technologique, le bonus d'attaque technologique et la capacité de lancement technique du lanceur d'origine, mais est par ailleurs traitée comme si vous lanciez la technique du pouvoir. La technique de pouvoir lancée depuis l'anneau n'y est plus stockée, libérant ainsi de l'espace.

A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] acid dégâts, and the first attack it makes before the end of its next turn has disavantage. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't disavantaged. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, it must make a DD 13 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it dies immediately without making death jet de sauvegardes. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust.

Holocron (Master).description:
Adventuring Gear

This holocron contains a single 7th-niveau pouvoir de la Force, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 6 with a combined niveau no greater than 7. After meditating with the holocron for at least 40 hours, a forcecaster with a Max Power Niveau of 7th or higher can make a DD 26 forcecasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise based on the alignment of the power(s) stored within. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir de la Force(s), which does not count against their pouvoir de la Forces known and can not be unlearned except through use of a remove curse power. On a failure, the power is not learned and the forcecaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by Force-wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form.

 

Holocron

Holocrons are information-storage devices used by force wielders that contain ancient lessons or valuable information in holographic form. They appear as palm-sized, glowing polyhedrons of crystalline material and hardware, and can only be activated and used through the power of the Force.

Blaster Chassis (Premium).name: Châssis Blaster (Premium)
Blaster Chassis (Premium).description:
Arme (n'importe quel Blaster)

Nécessite une harmonisation

Ce châssis de blaster modifiable est livré avec des emplacements de modification vacants pour les modifications du blaster. Il peut abriter des modifications de rareté premium ou inférieure.

Tsiraki (Matured).name: Tsiraki (affiné)
Tsiraki (Matured).description:
Consumable (Substance)

Tsiraki is a blue-colored alcoholic beverage crafted from fermented salakberries and pickling spices. As an action, you can apply this substance to a creature within 5 mètres. For the next 10 minutes, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d6]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 18 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 1 hour, during which they must roll a [[/r d6]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 18 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

 

Tsiraki

For the next minute, la créature experiences a high that allows them to roll an additional [[/r d3]] when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the high, la créature must succeed on a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde or experience a low that lasts 10 minutes, during which they must roll a [[/r d3]] and subtract the result when making an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Charisma. At the end of the low, la créature must make a DD 14 Wisdom jet de sauvegarde to resist addiction.

Projector Tank, Cryo (Devastating).name: Réservoir de projecteur, Cryo (dévastateur)
Projector Tank, Cryo (Devastating).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When triggered, this enhanced vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 24 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 7d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

 

Projector tank, cryo

When triggered, this vapor projector ammunition produces a beam of carbonite energy in a line 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide or a cône de 4,5 mètres. A single fuel tank holds enough fuel for three attacks in a line or a single attack in a cone. Each creature must make a DD 14 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d4]] cold dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and isn't slowed. If this dégâts reduces a creature to 0 points de vie, cette créature is frozen in carbonite for 1 hour.

Deafening Dart (Lethal).name: Fléchette assourdissante (létale)
Deafening Dart (Lethal).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

You have a +3 bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss made with this wrist launcher dart, which deals [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts on a hit. This bonus is in addition to any bonuses granted by the weapon. Once the dart has been fired, it no longer gives a bonus. Also on a hit, la créature must make a DD 22 Constitution jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d6]] sonic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde.

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

 

Deafening dart

De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, a creature is assourdi pendant 1 minute. At the end of an affected creature's turn, it can repeat this sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

Medpac (Fine).name: Medpac (Bien)
Medpac (Fine).description:
Consumable (Medpac)

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls two dice equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

 

Medpac

A medpac is a quick-acting syringe filled with a concentrated dose of kolto. As an action, you can use this medpac to restore points de vie to a beast or humanoid within 5 mètres. The creature rolls one die equal to the size of their Hit Die and regains points de vie equal to the amount rolled + their Constitution modificateur (minimum of one point de vie). If la créature has Hit Dice of different sizes, use whichever Hit Die size they have the most of.

Datacron Mk IV.name: Datacron MkIV
Datacron Mk IV.description:
Adventuring Gear

This datacron contains a single 5th-niveau pouvoir technique, or multiple powers of 1st-niveau 4 with a combined niveau no greater than 5. After tinkering with the datacron for at least 16 hours, a techcaster with a Max Power Niveau of 5th or higher can make a DD 22 techcasting test de caractéristique with maîtrise. On a success, they learn the contained pouvoir technique(s), which does not count against their pouvoir techniques known. On a failure, the power is not learned and the techcaster can't try again for 24 hours.

Datacrons are encrypted storage devices that contain an interactive projection, and are used to store high-value, sensitive information.

 

Datacron

A datacron is a type of holocron that can be accessed by non-Force-sensitives and are mainly used to store encrypted data. They are complete with an interactive projection to access the information.

Snare (Exceptional).name: Caisse Claire (Exceptionnelle)
Snare (Exceptional).description:
Consumable (Ammunition)

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 18 Strength or test de Dextérité (la cible chooses the ability to use), freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The snare has an AC of 14, 25 points de vie, immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons, and resistance to dégâts dealt by unenhanced melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.

 

Snare

When hit by this wrist launcher ammunition, a Medium or smaller creature is entravé until it is freed. A snare has no effect on formless or Large or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 Strength or test de Dextérité (la cible chooses the ability to use), freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The snare has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the snare frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the snare's effects.
